programme.desc: The squad investigates a double homicide related to an ongoing string of home invasions in the Hollywood Hills. Meanwhile, Sanchez attempts to reintegrate himself in the division after his suspension, and Capt. Raydor makes a fateful choice.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Sorry I Missed You
programme.desc: When a dead body pops out of the trunk at the end of a car chase, the squad must untangle connections between a superstar chef, a pediatric psychiatrist and his second wife, and a bankruptcy lawyer.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Drew Peterson: Killer Charm
programme.desc: In 2007, Stacy Peterson, the wife of veteran police sergeant Drew Peterson, goes missing. As police launch an intensive search to find her the case of the missing mother raises shocking new questions about the death of Peterson's third wife years earlier.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Mystery of the Gainesville Murders (Part 1)
programme.desc: During a terrifying three-day period in late August 1990, five college students were found brutally murdered in Gainesville, Florida.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Mystery of the Gainesville Murders (Part 2)
programme.desc: After five murders it would take investigators months - and the discovery of a campsite, a screwdriver and an audio tape - before they identified who the serial killer was.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Cheater
programme.desc: Little did Walter Scott of the band 'Bob Kuban and the In-Men' know that their 1966 hit-single 'The Cheater' would foreshadow the events that would lead to his demise.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Forever Hold Your Peace
programme.desc: When a young man confessed to the rape and murder of a woman in a restaurant, police were convinced the case was solved. Eight years later, another man imprisoned for an unrelated crime, admitted he committed the murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Reel Danger
programme.desc: When two young boys are viciously attacked while fishing in a nearby pond, authorities suspect a group of teenage thugs, but lack solid evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Who's Your Daddy
programme.desc: A tiny clue enables police to determine where the victim had been just before she died; it would also lead them to her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All Charged Up
programme.desc: Philadelphia authorities use an anonymous letter to locate a perpetrator.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Breaking the Mold
programme.desc: A family realizes that their health problems could be related to an uninvited 'guest.'

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shadow of a Doubt
programme.desc: An unknown assailant walked into a retail store and fired three shots, killing the owner. Police had suspects, but all of them had alibis.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tourist Trap
programme.desc: Bite marks lead the police to a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Unholy Vows

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Bitter Pill to Swallow
programme.desc: A pregnant woman experiences severe morning sickness and suspects something is amiss.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sip of Sins

programme.title: Lies, Crimes and Video: Summer Night Massacre

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: A Special Kind of Crazy

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: In Too Deep
programme.desc: Dustin risks the remainder of his season on an ambitious move upstream to raging waters, in a quest to add to his record breaking gold haul. After a brush with death, Fred must come up with a new plan before someone gets killed in their 20-foot dive hole.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: Under Pressure
programme.desc: Dustin's crew return to the deadly waters of The Chute and an exciting discovery ignites the crew to push past their limits. Fred's crew is dangerously deep at The Trifecta, and the pressure to get down to bedrock tests them all.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Under Siege
programme.desc: The Raneys attempt to help the Zabec family in Virginia. With pigs destroying the homestead, predators killing livestock and a huge oak threatening their cabin, the Raneys must convince them that their free-range dream is killing their homestead.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Nevada Thirst
programme.desc: In the Nevada desert, the Kondors' homestead has turned to dust. The Raneys discover rattler infested trailers, searing heat and sand storms, but when Marty finds the Kondors have no water, he gambles all to save the dying homestead.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Bearanoia

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Trapped
programme.desc: An isolated road becomes a death trap when a medical emergency strikes a secluded homestead. The Raneys face their first ever failed rescue.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Idaho Death Trap

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Arizona Washout

programme.desc: Brittani married a man who loves large women, but at 600 pounds she can barely contribute to their marriage. With dreams of a normal relationship, she gets weight-loss surgery. Her world then changes, leaving her with the challenge to forge a new life.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Not Safe for Work

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Ruffled Feathers
programme.desc: The guys conduct focus groups to sell their illogical inventions created by the other guys, then head to a shoe store where they get off on the wrong foot. Plus, tonight's big loser discovers he’s more flight than fight at the zoo.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Captain Fatbelly
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q lend an unhelpful hand while working at a high-tech store, then play detectives at the mall in search of perps on the loose. Tonight's loser gets the shakes while soaring high above the city.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Dog Days of Bummer

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Parent Trap

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Butt of the Joker
programme.desc: The guys pair up in focus group presentations, and tonight's loser tries to cure the public of a nasty habit, but gets people smoking mad.

programme.desc: Find out if any of the Jokers are avid skiers, and how the maître d' helped when seating patrons. Also, learn why Joe had a hard time escaping the giant cake.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Field of Screams

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Bleach for America
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr play receptionist for the day and then teach parents proper home-schooling techniques. One joker lands the endorsement deal of a lifetime.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Smashing Success
programme.desc: The gang learns how hard it is to find good help these days and then later returns to their artistic roots. One joker reluctantly delivers a series of crushing blows.

programme.title: Fast Foodies: Ron Funches

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Paternity Test
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr pose as concierges in a hotel lobby, and then commit insurance fraud with the help of some confused strangers. Afterwards, tonight's loser suffers a personal punishment that's anything but child's play.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Rock Botton

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Catastrophe

programme.desc: The guys compete in their first four-way challenge. Later, see what happens when they try to lead a kid's art class, and which loser fails so badly that he's hit with an on-the-spot punishment that leaves him seeing red.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Unforeseen Future
programme.desc: With her due date rapidly approaching and her baby breached, Kim learns that her house construction is delayed even further.

programme.title: Modern Family: Clean Out Your Junk Drawer
programme.desc: Gloria wins a bid at the school auction for a family seminar with famed doctor and author Debra Radcliffe, whose self-help book 'Clean Out Your Junk Drawer' encourages people to get rid of all their emotional junk to become healthier people.

programme.title: Modern Family: White Christmas
programme.desc: In an effort to have the picture-perfect white Christmas she's always dreamed of, Gloria rents a cabin in the mountains for the whole family to celebrate the holiday. Meanwhile, the family is preoccupied with their own agendas.

programme.title: Modern Family: Playdates
programme.desc: Claire and Phil have dinner plans with this great couple they met on vacation; the only problem is they never pick up the bill, so Claire insists Phil be strong this time and make them pay.

programme.title: Modern Family: Spread Your Wings
programme.desc: Sick of having the ducklings around the house, Claire and the kids seize an opportunity to help expedite the ducks leaving the nest while Phil is off visiting Alex at college.

programme.title: Modern Family: Clean for a Day
programme.desc: Before Claire officially takes over Jay's closet business, she decides she must get the house in order and make the family clean out the clutter; unfortunately, Phil and Luke can't bear to part with anything.

programme.title: Modern Family: Thunk in the Trunk
programme.desc: Jay lets his jealousy get the best of him when a life-size cutout of Gloria for her grocery store hot sauce display solicits all kinds of unsavoury attention from men. He enlists Manny as his accomplice in a poorly orchestrated heist.

programme.title: Modern Family: The Storm
programme.desc: A huge thunderstorm brings wide power outages, and the whole family congregates at Jay and Gloria's to use their generator. Jay has one foot out the door, though, desperately trying to make it to a reunion with some old Navy buddies.

programme.title: Modern Family: I Don't Know How She Does It
programme.desc: Claire has somehow turned into super mom, running Jay's closet business and yet still has time for all the duties at home. The kids could not be happier, but Phil could not be more frustrated.

programme.title: Modern Family: The Cover-Up
programme.desc: Phil has a new client who happens to be 'his type.' Knowing that might get him in trouble with Claire, he tells some seemingly innocent lies, which then lead to more, and soon enough he's in a full spiral.

programme.title: Modern Family: Express Yourself
programme.desc: Phil has the crazy idea of going on a trip to Paris with Claire, however, they are both so ridiculously tired but try to push through it. Meanwhile, Jay has taken over their bathroom remodel, which proves hazardous to the family.

programme.title: Modern Family: The Party
programme.desc: Manny and Luke are in charge of babysitting Lily so that the adults can enjoy a day to themselves. Claire and Gloria have a lovely trip to the spa planned, Phil and Mitch nerd out at the movies and Jay and Cam go to a sports bar to watch the big fight.

programme.title: Modern Family: Man Shouldn't Lie
programme.desc: Claire brings home a stray dog and gets the kids to help her hide it from Phil while she tries to find its owner. Unfortunately, her evasive behaviour only makes Phil try even harder to shower her with more attention.

programme.title: Modern Family: Promposal
programme.desc: With Closet-Con right around the corner, Claire is on high alert and convinced there is a mole in the company. Meanwhile, Phil goes vigilante when he and Gloria confront Auntie Alice for stealing her hot sauce recipe.

programme.title: Nightly Pop
programme.desc: A topical pop culture talk show.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: A New York Family Affair
programme.desc: Kanye invites the entire family to NYC for his fashion show, but Khloé is torn over whether Lamar can handle such a big first appearance since his accident. Meanwhile, Kim tries to keep Scott busy in NYC, and Lamar meet Caitlyn for the first time.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Significant Others and Significant Brothers
programme.desc: After years of being Rob's number one supporter, Khloé is upset when she's the last to know that he's moving into a house of his own. Meanwhile, Kim speculates what's up with Kourtney and Corey's friendship, and Kourtney becomes an interior design diva.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: All About Meme
programme.desc: The girls start to make peace with Rob's new relationship, but feelings get hurt when Rob starts making jokes on social media. Meanwhile Kris and Kim reach their breaking points as housemates and Kendall struggles with feeling left out.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Fake It Til You Make It
programme.desc: Kendall, Kylie and Khloé undergo a prosthetics makeover in hopes of experiencing a 'normal' day out. Meanwhile Scott is feeling insecure about his place in the family and Kris is resistant to Corey's idea of fun.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Kardashian Curse
programme.desc: Khloé heads to Napa with Kourtney and Kris where her tough decision to move forward with her divorce is made even tougher by Kris's actions. Meanwhile, Scott goes to great lengths to rid himself of the alleged Kardashian Curse.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Snow You Didn't! (Part 1)
programme.desc: Kris orchestrates a surprise family vacation to Vail, but their nostalgic getaway hits a bump when the family learns that Rob has proposed to Blac Chyna back in Los Angeles.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Snow You Didn't! (Part 2)
programme.desc: The family vacation in Vail continues as everyone tries to process the shocking news of Rob's engagement. Meanwhile Scott tries to prove he can behave himself for the rest of the trip.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Oh Baby!
programme.desc: Fresh off the heels of his engagement announcement, Rob has another piece of news that will change the family forever. Meanwhile, Kylie struggles with anxiety from being in the spotlight.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Iced Out
programme.desc: On a trip to Iceland for Kanye's music video shoot over Kourtney's birthday weekend, Kim finds herself spread too thin as she tries to cater to both her sister and her husband. Meanwhile, Scott debates showing up in Ireland to surprise Kourtney.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Got MILF?
programme.desc: Feeling that Kanye is constantly misunderstood and unfairly vilified, Kim struggles over whether to publicly take a stand for her husband. Kim also prepares for her sexy cameo in Fergie's 'MILF$' music video.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Havana Good Day
programme.desc: The girls jet off for a once in a lifetime trip to the formerly restricted country of Cuba. Meanwhile, Kourtney butts heads with a family member and Kris starts to lose it when she can't reach her girls overseas.

programme.title: The Daily Pop
programme.desc: Your go-to for behind-the-scenes scoop, celebrity guests and entertainment conversation.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Havana Good Night
programme.desc: As the Kardashian Cuban vacation continues, Kim’s commitment to her work engagements on Mother’s Day stirs up a disagreement. Meanwhile, Scott comes down with a major case of FOMO, and Kim tries to resolve the tension over Kylie’s Puma endorsement.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Digital Rage
programme.desc: The drama between Rob and the family flares up again after Chyna launches an app they find questionable. Meanwhile, Scott is on a mission to prove that Kourtney's allergies are fake.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Blood, Sweat and Fears
programme.desc: When Kris sees how deeply Khloé is struggling, she urges Rob to reconnect with his sister and best friend. Meanwhile, Kourtney worries that she will give Scott mixed messages if she joins him in Vegas, and Kris pushes herself too far working out.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Love at First Fight
programme.desc: When Rob and Chyna get into an explosive fight, the girls rally behind them with hopes that they can fix their relationship. Meanwhile, the family tries to convince Khloé to break her streak of bad birthdays.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Sea Shells By the Sea Shore
programme.desc: Style walks into the kitchen when Harlem's very own Marcus Samuelsson and Los Angeles' finest Michael Voltaggio arrive to conquer Mount Flay. They're counting on dim sum master Ed Harris or seafood connoisseur Jason McLeod to help get to the top.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Foreign Relations
programme.desc: The powerhouse duo of Giada De Laurentiis and Michael Symon team up once again to take down their friend Bobby Flay.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Out On a Limb
programme.desc: NBC's Tamron Hall and 'Chopped's' Ted Allen are in the arena and Bobby is in their sights! They've brought two talented chefs to take him down. Whiz kid Katherine Humphus gets into a culinary slugfest with the no-nonsense John Wassil.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: East Coast's Finest
programme.desc: Celebrity chef and author Curtis Stone teams up with Michael Symon to rattle Bobby. Rhode Island's Chef Antonio Franco goes head-to-head against New York Chef Luke Venner for the chance to take on Bobby Flay.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Stuffed and Fried
programme.desc: Beach Bites' Katie Lee and Thai chef Jet Tila arrive to take down Bobby Flay with two incredible chefs of their choosing; restauranteur Crista Luedtke and the fashionable Alan Vargas.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Ruling With an Iron Fist
programme.desc: Two of the toughest judges from Iron Chef, Simon Majumdar and Donatella Arpaia, come to Bobby's arena. These two know exactly what to look for in a contender.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: The Boys Are Back
programme.desc: It's new school versus old school, South Western-style, when veteran Santa Fe chef Todd Hall and Phoenix chef Brian Archibald duke it out with hopes of convincing Iron Chef Michael Symon and Chef Michael Voltaggio that they have what it takes.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Arrivals and Departures
programme.desc: Vying for a chance to compete against Bobby Flay is no small feat when Iron Chef Alex Guarnaschelli and Iron Chef judge Donatella Arpaia decide who gets the shot.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: If I Dip, You Dip, We Dip
programme.desc: Legendary funny woman Ana Gasteyer has Bobby Flay in stitches as she and Chef Josh Capon try to take Bobby down. He has to dip and dodge Ana's comedic barbs as he takes on chefs Sarah Cloyd and Danny Brown, who are looking to humor themselves with a win.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Pump It Up
programme.desc: The laughs are flowing when comedian Tony Rock and jokester Alex Guarnaschelli heckle Bobby Flay in his own kitchen. Delaware chef Bill Clifton and Long Island's Stephan Bogardus compete for the last laugh.

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible: Listless in Louisiana
programme.desc: Robert Irvine travels to Lafitte, LA, to visit Boutte's Bayou Restaurant, where owner Nick is too proud to ask for help. Robert guides Nick in becoming a real leader and trusting his staff before it's too late for the iconic coastal watering hole.

programme.title: Dinner: Impossible: Mission in Paradise
programme.desc: Robert Irvine makes a feast without a kitchen for 30 people in Oahu, Hawaii. Robert and his team must battle the weather, harvest their ingredients, catch their own seafood and manage an unpredictable underground oven to pull off the impossible.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: We Will, We Will Judge You
programme.desc: Chef Alex Guarnaschelli and actor Lou Diamond Phillips bring in heavy hitters to take Bobby down. Recruited from Bobby's own ranks, former judges chef Adrienne Cheatham and chef Michele Ragussis are both ready for a win of their own.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: The Iron Age
programme.desc: Iron Chef meets Beat Bobby Flay when Jose Garces takes on the newest Iron Chef, Stephanie Izard. Iron Chef Alex Guarnaschelli and Simon Majumdar decide whose cuisine reigns supreme.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: The Iron Age
programme.desc: Iron Chef meets Beat Bobby Flay when Jose Garces takes on the newest Iron Chef, Stephanie Izard. Iron Chef Alex Guarnaschelli and Simon Majumdar decide whose cuisine reigns supreme.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: How You Bean?
programme.desc: Food Network's Damaris Phillips and Sunny Anderson show up to light a torch under Bobby Flay's stove and set his kitchen ablaze. Chefs Brian Lopes and Jesse Wykle go head-to-head for a chance to make waves in Bobby's kitchen.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Whiz Kids
programme.desc: Sunny Anderson and kid chefs Gibson Borelli and Tyler Zager have just one homework assignment: beat Bobby Flay! They'll see to it that either California restaurateur Claud Beltran or first-time dad Brian Santos has what it takes.

programme.desc: The wardens are deep into deer season, investigating a suspected poacher and a felon who shouldn't be using a firearm to hunt. An alligator and her hatchlings must be captured and relocated from a school.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Wild Encounters
programme.desc: Texas Game Wardens relocate a large herd of pronghorn to restore populations in West Texas, investigate the killing of a protected rattlesnake, and wrangle a loose bull. Game Wardens check hunting camps to ensure no one's taking too many white-tail deer.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Armed and Dangerous
programme.desc: Texas Game Wardens see plenty of violations at night, from road hunters to felons possessing firearms. Game Wardens stop wildlife crimes with anonymous tips about anglers keeping over the limit and a specially trained k-9 unit to sniff out illegal items.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Uncuffed: Trouble on the Lake
programme.desc: On Lake Limestone, wardens must do a routine check on multiple boats, and a team is deployed to search for a hiding poacher. Later, a gator is found roaming a garage, while Warden Boone joins a manhunt with local police to find a group of armed suspects.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Confessions of a Poacher
programme.desc: Warden Richards confronts a suspected poacher for illegally hunting ducks and geese. Wardens Ben and Chelsea Bailey monitor an injured deer running along a busy highway, and a man is arrested after confessing to poaching a deer.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Anglers, Alcohol and Owls
programme.desc: In Texas, a woman is found in distress on the side of the highway. Warden Hensz handles an aggressive family of owls, while Warden Bailey responds to a call about underage drinkers holding a fishing tournament.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Uncuffed: Trouble on the Lake
programme.desc: On Lake Limestone, wardens must do a routine check on multiple boats, and a team is deployed to search for a hiding poacher. Later, a gator is found roaming a garage, while Warden Boone joins a manhunt with local police to find a group of armed suspects.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Trespassers Beware
programme.desc: In Texas, a new year brings new cadets and a rookie almost gets run down. In Beaumont, Game Warden Boone investigates an armed trespasser. Game Wardens encounter a Mexican boat on U.S. waters while looking for illegal gill nets on the Rio Grande.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: The Face of Danger
programme.desc: The game warden's marine team searches a foreign cargo vessel in the Gulf of Mexico. A man is suspected of poaching 15 deer out of season and the game wardens discover a large marijuana growing operation outside of Dallas.

programme.title: Northwest Law: Of Clams and Car Crashes
programme.desc: The Washington State Fish & Wildlife are trained to handle any scenario and that concept is put to the test when a three-car crash interrupts an officer interrogating suspected clam poachers.

programme.title: Northwest Law: Boats and Does
programme.desc: Washington's Fish and Wildlife officers are on the case rescuing animals on land, and helping civilians running into trouble on the waters of Moses Lake.

programme.title: Too Cute!: Tiny Watchdogs
programme.desc: Featuring Yorkshire terriers, lagotto romagnolos and German shepherds.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Darkness Comes Knocking
programme.desc: A couple that has been together for seven years are being torn apart by a cat named Darkness. Another couple moves into their dream home but their four cats turn it into a war zone.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Big Croc Diaries
programme.desc: Steve and Terri introduce their favorite crocodiles at Australia Zoo, including a close-up examination of the five biggest crocs they lunge and strike. High-speed film sequences show the tremendous power and speed of each crocodile.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: O Come All Ye Mongoose
programme.desc: Keeper hope that dwarf mongoose couple, Cooper and Mini, may deliver some new babies in time for Christmas, but it's not an easy ride.

programme.title: The Zoo: A Rare Egg
programme.desc: It's a series of firsts when the Central Park Zoo welcomes its first-ever Atlantic puffin chick. A rhino called Penny undergoes a series of allergy tests, while an endangered species of gecko welcomes her first hatchling.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: How 'Bout Them Apples
programme.desc: Pete trucks out to Walden, NY, to build a treehouse tasting room for Angry Orchard. The pavilion-style structure will elevate orchard-goers high above the acres of apple trees where they can enjoy a glass of hard cider and soak in views of the orchard.

programme.title: Tanked!: Howie Mandel is the Brains Behind ATM
programme.desc: Howie Mandel contacts ATM to build a tank for his production office. The comedian and television host has difficulty making up his mind so Wayde and Brett must design a tank without any guidance.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: A Brother's Return
programme.desc: Country Matt returns to help his brother, a new parolee, overcome his fear of dogs. Earl and Tia's daughter-in-law race to save a stray running loose in scorching temperatures. A couple of empty nesters visit VRC in search of a new friend.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Shelter From the Storm
programme.desc: Tia hires three new parolees, but things quickly take a turn for the worse. A rural shelter threatened with closure needs Tia's help. And a family recovering from the loss of their home and dog in a flood comes to VRC looking for a new best friend.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: In the Crosshairs
programme.desc: Game wardens enforce the law across Texas. A hunting club has a trespassing issue. People are caught attempting to illegally cross the Rio Grande. An argument between neighbors is mediated. Fishermen receive citations on the Gulf of Mexico.

programme.title: Movie: Only for One Night
programme.desc: A married man has a one-night stand with his wife's sister, who threatens to tell her.

programme.title: Movie: Tyler Perry's Temptation: Confessions of a Marriage Counselor
programme.desc: A married woman's life is changed forever when a handsome billionaire comes into her life and she gives into temptation.

programme.title: Movie: Notorious
programme.desc: Rapping on the streets of Brooklyn, Chris Wallace discovered his love and gift for song writing. On his way to the top, lies and confusion ended his life early.

programme.title: First Wives Club: Something Blue
programme.desc: Hazel and Bree go to Sag Harbor to support Ari, both in present day and in flashbacks, as they reminisce about Ari's wedding to David, and how unhappy she was even back then. As Ari considers divorce, David surprises her by asking for a vow renewal.

programme.title: Bigger: Where Do We Go From Here?
programme.desc: A single woman takes a deeper look at her life.

programme.title: Martin: I, Martin, Take Thee Pam?
programme.desc: Martin discovers that his marriage is invalid and that he's actually married to Pam.

programme.title: Martin: Power to the People's Court
programme.desc: After Tommy accidentally backs into Sheneneh's car, she serves him with a court summons.

programme.title: The Cleveland Show: Brownsized
programme.desc: Cleveland takes an offer from his boss, Mr. Waterman, to quit his job with six months of severance pay, but struggles to find a way to tell Donna. Meanwhile, Rallo finds a handsome and charming man for Roberta.

programme.title: The Cleveland Show: A Rodent Like This
programme.desc: When Donna discovers a rat loose in the house, she immediately moves herself and the kids in with her mother.

programme.title: The Cleveland Show: California Dreamin' (All the Cleves Are Brown)
programme.desc: The Browns pack their bags and move to Los Angeles, where Cleveland pursues his life-long dream of becoming a major league baseball scout.

programme.title: The Parkers: Single Black Female
programme.desc: Elaine, a new friend in Nikki's life, threatens the bond between her and Andell.

programme.title: The Parkers: Kim Who?
programme.desc: When Kim rides T's scooter without a helmet, she becomes injured and loses her memory.

programme.title: The Parkers: In Sickness and in Health
programme.desc: Prof. Oglevee has surgery but doesn't get much rest when Nikki visits him in the hospital.

programme.title: The Parkers: Et Tu, Andell?
programme.desc: The gang hits a local club to help Nikki relieve some stress, but the opposite happens.

programme.title: The Cleveland Show: The Hangover Part Tubbs
programme.desc: When Donna runs for the school board, she tries to keep an embarrassing Cleveland out of her campaign. But her efforts blow up in her face when he 'kills' a new friend playing 'The Hurt Locker' game.

programme.title: The Cleveland Show: Who Done Did It?
programme.desc: When Cleveland starts seeking revenge on everyone in Stoolbend, things get out of hand and he's accused of a murder he didn't commit.

programme.title: The Cleveland Show: Fist and the Furious
programme.desc: Cleveland feels bad for Dr. Fist because he has no friends, so he decides to make him 'one of the guys.'

programme.title: Black-ish: The Name Game
programme.desc: Dre and Bow have a gender reveal party, and Dre is thrilled because it's his turn to name the baby. He decides on a culturally significant name that Bow and Ruby aren't a fan of.

programme.title: Black-ish: I'm a Survivor
programme.desc: When Dre goes back to Compton for a funeral, he is reunited with his old crew and struggles with survivor's remorse for the friends he left behind. Meanwhile, Bow becomes self-conscious when Ruby criticizes her parenting style.

programme.title: Black-ish: One Angry Man
programme.desc: Dre is forced to participate in jury duty after Junior responds to the summons that was thrown away. The case is supposed to be open and shut, but when Dre sees that the defendant is a young African American, he feels responsible to give him a fair trial.

programme.title: Black-ish: ToysRn'tUs
programme.desc: Janine gives Diane a white Girlstory doll for her birthday, and when Bow tries to return it for a black doll, she is shocked by the limited options offered.

programme.title: Black-ish: Manternity
programme.desc: Dre considers taking paternity leave after he realizes that Zoey is arguably the best child and their bond developed while he was unemployed when she was born. Meanwhile, Bow tries to hide her pregnancy in order to get a promotion.

programme.title: Black-ish: Richard Youngsta
programme.desc: Dre is excited about doing a campaign with a popular rap star but becomes conflicted when Bow and Ruby provide feedback suggesting it plays on stereotypes. Meanwhile, Bow is determined to get the family to stop eating so much take-out food.

programme.title: Black-ish: What Lies Beneath
programme.desc: Dre's sister Rhonda is in town, and he feels a little jealous of her close relationship with Pops. Dre and Bow urge Zoey to take Junior to a high school party, and things get out of hand.

programme.title: Black-ish: Sister, Sister
programme.desc: Bow's sister comes to town after filming a stint on a reality show, and they couldn't have less in common. Meanwhile, Zoey suggests that Dre spend more time with Junior since she’s leaving for college, and Jack and Diane decide to rebrand themselves.

programme.title: Black-ish: All Groan Up
programme.desc: When Zoey gets into several colleges around the country, Dre and Bow begin to feel worried and sentimental. They reflect back on memories they've had with the family and wonder what life will be like without her around all the time.

programme.title: Black-ish: Liberal Arts
programme.desc: Dre tearfully drops Zoey off to college for her two-day orientation, and she hits it off with a fellow incoming freshman, Miriam, after they ditch the campus tour. They are smitten upon meeting Aaron, who is running the Black Student Union booth.

programme.title: Black-ish: Sprinkles
programme.desc: Initially wary, Dre embraces throwing Bow's baby shower and wants it to be unforgettable. However, his plans are put on hold when Bow stops by the OB/GYN with a headache and discovers she is having complications.

programme.title: Movie: Tyler Perry's Temptation: Confessions of a Marriage Counselor
programme.desc: A married woman's life is changed forever when a handsome billionaire comes into her life and she gives into temptation.

programme.title: Movie: Transformers: The Last Knight
programme.desc: With all-out war raging between humans and invading machines from another planet, an inventor teams up with a professor, an English Lord and machine named Bumblebee to find answers in the ancient past as to why the machines keep coming to Earth.

programme.title: Movie: Hunter Killer
programme.desc: A submarine captain on a rescue mission in the Arctic Ocean discovers that the Russian president has been kidnapped and that a coup is in progress. With the world teetering on the brink of WWIII, he must navigate enemy waters to rescue the President.

programme.title: Movie: Gone in 60 Seconds
programme.desc: A retired car thief re-enters the business to steal 50 cars with his crew in one night.

programme.title: Movie: I, Robot
programme.desc: In 2035, robots that have been programmed to never hurt humans have become part of the daily lives of people. When the main suspect in the murder of a scientist is a robot, a robot-hating detective begins to wonder if humans are actually safe.

programme.title: Movie: Amityville: The Awakening
programme.desc: A single mother moves her family into a house to be closer to specialists for her comatose son. The oldest daughter begins to experience intense nightmares and paranormal attacks. She learns that they now live in the Amityville house, and must escape.

programme.title: Movie: The Hollow
programme.desc: Three sisters must scramble to stay alive when an ungodly creature of fire, bones and earth terrorizes Shelter Island on Halloween eve.

programme.title: Wynonna Earp: Love's All Over
programme.desc: Love is in the air as Waverly and Nicole celebrate their engagement with an enchanted evening.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Jeopardy Room
programme.desc: A defector is left in a room with a hidden bomb with three hours to find and disarm it.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Encounter
programme.desc: In another dimension, the extraordinary becomes ordinary and anything is possible.

programme.title: Wynonna Earp: Two-Faced Jack
programme.desc: Henry and Deputy Marshal Dolls put aside their differences to infiltrate a Revenant hive. Wynonna must employ all her wits to avoid becoming a serial killer’s next victim.

programme.title: Wynonna Earp: No Cure for Crazy
programme.desc: The forest reveals its secrets and a clue to Nicole's past. Meanwhile, Wynonna pays an unexpected visit to her mother.

programme.title: Wynonna Earp: Jolene
programme.desc: A demon causes havoc in town as Wynonna, Waverly and Jolene must decide who they can trust.

programme.title: Wynonna Earp: The Other Woman
programme.desc: A mysterious woman who knows a little too much about the Earps arrives on the Homestead with a special mission for Wynonna and Waverly. The rest of the team must wrangle a deadly fire witch.

programme.title: Movie: Shut In
programme.desc: After a horrific accident kills her husband and paralyzes her son, a child psychologist takes a young boy, dealing with the loss of his mother, into her home. When he disappears in a winter storm, she confronts ghosts and deadly visions to find him.

programme.title: Movie: Hunter Killer
programme.desc: A submarine captain on a rescue mission in the Arctic Ocean discovers that the Russian president has been kidnapped and that a coup is in progress. With the world teetering on the brink of WWIII, he must navigate enemy waters to rescue the President.

programme.title: Movie: The Strangers: Prey at Night
programme.desc: While on a road trip, a family stops for the night at a trailer park that seems to be deserted, despite signs that someone has been staying in their trailer. Once night falls, three masked figures appear and begin to terrorize the innocent family.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Tear Downs and I Dos
programme.desc: With their wedding just months away, this couple hopes to find and renovate their forever home with room for their growing brood of rescue dogs.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Designing Memories
programme.desc: After bouncing around from one rental disaster to the next, a couple is ready to find a first home that's as quirky as they are.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Striking the Right Chord
programme.desc: A couple with a baby is living in her dad's cramped condo while looking for a home near Nashville's Music Row.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Party on the Hill
programme.desc: After navigating a long-distance relationship, a couple finally decides to put down roots and build a home together in Brazil. Now, the two outdoorsy engineers are looking for the perfect mountain-view home where they can entertain friends and family.

programme.title: Flipping Across America: Outdated Flips
programme.desc: In Atlanta, Ken and Anita are tackling a confusing 1970s split-level home, while Tarek and Christina are flipping an older southern California home that looks like it hasn't been updated or cleaned since the 60s.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Rescue: Sweat Equity
programme.desc: Nicole helps a newly engaged couple modernize and restore functionality to their outdated, 1970s-inspired kitchen and bathroom. To stay under budget, Nicole teaches them the meaning of sweat equity as they chip in to help the team cross the finish line.

programme.title: House Hunters: On the Rebound in Tulsa
programme.desc: After being outbid on a house they loved, a young newlywed couple is on the rebound and searching again in Tulsa. He's budget-minded and prefers a place with a clean and modern style, but she's not as frugal and likes older homes with character.

programme.title: House Hunters International: Game On in Breda
programme.desc: A family of six takes advantage of a job promotion and looks for a home in Breda, Netherlands. They're looking for a house with a large backyard that's close to schools, but she wants authentic Dutch charm while he seeks something more modern.

programme.title: House Hunters: A Place for My Daughter in Virginia
programme.desc: A buyer wants to upgrade from his small rental in Norfolk, Virginia, to a home with a room for his young daughter, and a pool table. But along on the hunt is his future roommate and best friend, who has his own priorities in mind.

programme.title: House Hunters International: Bustling or Beach in Qingdao, China
programme.desc: A young couple is moving back to their collegiate stomping grounds in Qingdao, China. He wants something close to the Laoshan District, but she wants to be near the beach.

programme.title: Flipping Across America: Foundational Flips
programme.desc: In Fort Worth, Texas, Andy and Ashley work on a big, corner-lot house with some cracks that hint at serious structural damage. Meanwhile, Jon and Mary deal with major foundation issues while flipping a home in one of Houston's hottest neighborhoods.

programme.title: Flipping Across America: Cramped Cottage Flips
programme.desc: In Nashville, Page and DeRon create vaulted ceilings and reimagine a cottage's footprint to make the most of their 858 square feet. Then in Southern California, Jessie and Tina work to reintroduce vintage elements for their tiny cottage built in 1907.

programme.title: Good Bones: Small House, Big Problems
programme.desc: Mina and Karen find that "you get what you pay for" when they buy a bargain house for $5,000.

programme.title: Good Bones: Saddest Home on Sanders Street
programme.desc: Mina and Karen purchase a crumbling house in the Bates-Hendricks neighbourhood, only to find out it's the first house they can't save. With a clean slate, Mina designs a white beauty with new buyers in mind.

programme.title: Good Bones: New House, Old Spirit
programme.desc: Mina and Karen venture just east of downtown Indy to take on a two-storey, worn-down home that's as risky as it is disgusting. The house has almost no sustainable foundation, so the ladies try to rebuild from the ground up while adding features.

programme.title: Good Bones: Tiny Condo, Giant Upgrade
programme.desc: Mina and Karen purchase a building with multiple condos, and to test the market, they're starting with a smaller unit on the ground floor.

programme.title: Good Bones: Free House, Expensive Reno
programme.desc: Mina and Karen venture into a new neighborhood, Irvington, where Mina acquired a home from a real estate friend. When a serious problem arises with the small cottage, the entire plan for the property changes and making a profit becomes an enormous hurdle.

programme.title: Good Bones: The Gloriously Glam Home
programme.desc: Mina and Karen purchase a vacant lot and what begins as a new construction to sell on the market quickly turns into a build for Mina's friends. However, a lingering pipe issue may add time and a hefty price tag to the project.

programme.title: Love It or List It: Small House, Great Neighborhood
programme.desc: William and Ashley bought their cozy, 1950s home in a prime neighborhood when their family was much smaller, but their three growing sons are testing the limitations of the house.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Runaway Faye

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Moving On

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Too Close for Comfort

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Smoothie Operator

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Family Matters
programme.desc: When Todd takes the juice bar employees on a teambuilding excursion, Savannah and Chase get into a disagreement. And when Faye has a health scare, the Chrisley's are forced to come together.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Goat Farm Yourself

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: A Shot in the Dark
programme.desc: What happened in Cara Ryan's bedroom was a mystery. She admitted she shot her ex-husband, but investigators needed to know if it was murder or self-defense. Detectives heard several versions of the story, but for a jury, there was only one truth.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Who Killed the Radio Star
programme.desc: Steven B. Williams was a DJ with a golden voice. Then he vanished. It was a mystery that stretched from California to Montana. The clue to it all was wrapped in napkin tucked in a cabinet hidden in a library.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Buried Secrets
programme.desc: Judy Carlson lived in a painful limbo. Her son disappeared without a trace. Years went by and she may never have known his fate if not for a rookie detective’s dogged work but to solve this cold case, the investigator also need the help of a killer.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Suspicion
programme.desc: The neighbors you’re about to meet enjoyed mixing business with pleasure then a murder made them face the reality that a killer was in their midst.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Devil in Disguise
programme.desc: Frank Rodriguez was a Navy vet who dedicated his life to helping needy children, not a guy with many enemies. Figuring out who would want him dead was a challenge. How he died was also a mystery investigators needed to solve to catch his killer.

programme.title: Dateline: Unforgettable: Secret Lives
programme.desc: This story was one of Andrea Canning's first assignments for 'Dateline,' and one she still can’t forget. When Jen Ramsaran disappeared, police searched online for clues and wondered if she escaped the real world for a fantasy world.

programme.title: Killer Motive: Waking Nightmare
programme.desc: When a wife claims she woke up to discover her husband had been shot to death as she slept next to him – and she didn't see or hear a thing – police are dubious. Is she a shocked and grieving widow, or a cunning killer with a twisted master plan?

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Stealing Paradise
programme.desc: A group of adventurous Americans thought they had found paradise. It was a tropical hideaway, the kind of place where people didn't ask a lot of questions about their neighbors, until some of those neighbors started to disappear.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Murder in Broad Daylight
programme.desc: He dreamed of being the next Steve Jobs, a young entrepreneur who wanted to change the world. But his world came crashing down one morning with four gunshots. This was a crime of passion: a fatal triangle involving a husband, a wife and a boss.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Betrayal Of Trust
programme.desc: Deede Keller had a loving family, a tight circle of friends and a new man in her life. When she vanished, disturbing clues would point investigators to a suspect with a dark secret. The case provided a twist that left the courtroom astonished.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Mystery in Mustang
programme.desc: Keith Bryan was a beloved fire chief, a pillar of his community. Then he was shot in his home, leaving police to wonder who would want to hurt the local hero? Turns out, someone was living a secret life, and it was about to be exposed.

programme.title: Snapped: Whitney Harris
programme.desc: A young mother claims she was caught up in her boyfriend’s murderous plan.

programme.title: Snapped: Diane Staudte
programme.desc: They say deaths come in three, but when a young woman falls ill after eerily similar deaths of her father and brother, suspicion turns to a family member and the limits of a mother’s love.

programme.title: Snapped: Lisa Graham
programme.desc: In a shocking turn of events, a mother must face her demons when her daughter is left for dead after a vicious murder.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer: A Genius Murder
programme.desc: When a brilliant scientist and devoted family man is found beaten to death, the evidence leads police to make arrests, but an astounding revelation turns the investigation on its head.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer: The Love That Kills
programme.desc: A loving, single mother of two is the victim of a bizarre murder, leading detectives to investigate a number of suspects, until a killer with a dark obsession hiding in plain sight is revealed.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer: Killed by Kindness
programme.desc: When a recently divorced mother is found strangled to death on her couch, several suspects emerge until the killer is revealed to be someone close to home.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer: New Jersey Nightmare
programme.desc: A recently retired woman is found savagely murdered, and detectives must battle a lack of evidence and track down a long list of suspects to find a killer nobody saw coming.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood: Killer Secret
programme.desc: A single mother is found dead in a hotel stairwell and detectives quickly uncover that she had a secret life that may have led to her demise.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood: The Vanishing Cop
programme.desc: When a local police officer goes missing, it quickly becomes apparent that even those whose job it is to protect and serve are not immune from the wrath of jealousy.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood: Deadly Greed
programme.desc: Three members of a wealthy family are gunned down in their own home. But with little evidence to go on, investigators embark on a multi-year surveillance operation to see if they can prove their instincts are correct.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood: Secrets and Lies
programme.desc: A beloved entrepreneur is murdered in his office. A secret double life is quickly revealed, and despite mountains of suspicion, lies and motives, his killer is not who you'd assume.

programme.title: Snapped: Karen Sanchez
programme.desc: A missing man’s body is found, his wife finds herself under a microscope.

programme.title: Snapped: Keanna Barnes
programme.desc: Two deceased men both helped out a damsel in distress. Playing the good samaritan may have cost them their lives, and authorities are worried that she could put someone else at risk.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Aliens of Hell Highway

programme.title: Strange Evidence: The Devil's Mutant

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Doomsday Vegas UFO

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Door to the Undead
programme.desc: Security guards patrolling the basement of an empty municipal building are shocked when they encounter a door repeatedly opening and violently slamming shut; experts investigate a connection to black magic rituals and the building's disturbing past.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Curse of the Amazon Nazis
programme.desc: When investigators spot strange anomalies in the Amazon jungle, the discovery stokes rumors of a long-lost Nazi base in the Americas; experts follow the evidence to a grisly find, revealing a secret history of nuclear secrets and a notorious dictator.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Treasures of Valhalla
programme.desc: When experts investigate an ancient network of tunnels rumored to be the hiding place of lost royal treasure, they find evidence of human sacrifice for the Viking god Odin. An abandoned fortress in Siberia might shed new light on Genghis Khan.

programme.desc: Security guards patrolling the basement of an empty municipal building are shocked when they encounter a door repeatedly opening and violently slamming shut; experts investigate a connection to black magic rituals and the building's disturbing past.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Mystery of the Ice Cave

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: American Stonehenge
programme.desc: Investigating the mysterious pattern of rocks at the bottom of Lake Michigan known as Underwater Stonehenge. At the notorious Alcatraz prison, Rob uses state-of-the-art technology in search of rumored escape tunnels.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: America's Buried Massacre
programme.desc: Rob hunts for a legendary mass grave that could expose a dark secret of America's industrial past. High in the mountains, a giant lake is mysteriously disappearing, and Rob uses cutting-edge technology to find out why.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Mystery of the Serpent Mound
programme.desc: Rob explores mysterious tunnels beneath Denver's airport, the capitol building, and downtown to investigate rumors of a secret organization that operates below. In Ohio, he tries to uncover the ancient secrets of a giant mound shaped like a serpent.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: Ghost Ship of the Desert
programme.desc: After a huge cargo ship suddenly vanishes with 27 crew members on board, new evidence suggests the culprit may be a mythical rogue wave. Plus, recently discovered evidence may prove the existence of a ghost ship in the Californian desert.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: Flight of Terror
programme.desc: In 2009, an Air France flight going missing and investigators discover this tragedy could happen again. After a huge area of Siberian forest is destroyed, investigators race to find the culprit. New evidence might finally solve this century-old mystery.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: Atlantis: The Lost Evidence
programme.desc: Atlantis is one of the most famous disappearances of all time. After thousands of years, state-of-the-art technology might finally be able to crack this ancient mystery. And after nine hikers die in a gruesome cold case, new science provides a hot lead.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: Forbidden City of Gold
programme.desc: New technology reveals lost cities in inhospitable jungle, and researchers wonder if the mythical city of El Dorado could be the next discovery. After a crystal is found on a shipwreck, experts believe it could prove how the Vikings discovered America.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: The Men Who Beat Alcatraz
programme.desc: In 1962, three convicts attempt the impossible and escape from Alcatraz prison. Officials believe the men drowned, but a new scientific experiment suggests they made it to shore.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: Curse of the Bermuda Triangle
programme.desc: After five planes vanish in the Bermuda Triangle, new science suggests a strange geological force is responsible. Today, satellites are revealing lost tribes living in the Amazon jungle, but some civilizations remain missing, stumping experts.

programme.title: Black Files Declassified: Rise of the Nightstalkers
programme.desc: A former CIA operative investigates new evidence of a top-secret group known as the 'Nightstalkers,' a clandestine team of the world's best aviators involved in the assassination of Osama Bin Laden and other dangerous black ops.

programme.title: Black Files Declassified: How to Stop an Assassination
programme.desc: Newly declassified document reveal the details of a top-secret government program created in the wake of the Kennedy assassination to go to extreme lengths to protect the president. A former CIA operative exposes the cutting-edge defenses now in place.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: The Ties That Bind
programme.desc: A teenage romance gets caught in family ties.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: The Sergeant and the Schoolgirl
programme.desc: When high school senior Michelle Miller joins the Future Soldiers program, she sees it as the first step to realizing her dream of enlisting in the Army. But a forbidden affair with her recruiter risks her career in the Army, and her future itself.

programme.title: Relatively Evil: A Family to Fear
programme.desc: 59-yr-old Susan Greene and 62-yr-old Dennis Goins get a new lease on love later in life. After they tie the knot, the couple must face each other's dark side, and worse, family members. Then a gruesome weekend-long crime spree tears the family apart.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Roadside Murder
programme.desc: Theresa Wesolowski was murdered on May 29, 1999, leaving police baffled for nearly 10 years. They finally got a break in the case when a new DNA technique identified a co-worker, Mark Libecki, who was convicted of 1st degree murder in 2009.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: Trail of Fear
programme.desc: The body of a 74-year-old woman is found bludgeoned to death, the gruesome discovery sends shockwaves across the community. Suspicion and paranoia take control. Then a young girl vanishes, and her case exposes sordid secrets hidden for decades.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: Unsafe Anywhere
programme.desc: 21 year old Joel Larson is shot to death in a safe haven community for gay people in 1990's Minneapolis. Two more shootings terrorize the community as they realize a serial killer in disguise lives among them.

programme.title: The Knife in the Pocket
programme.desc: The sister of a domestic violence murder victim recounts her personal journey to understand her sister's death.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Deadly Offer
programme.desc: When a young woman finds herself stranded... An offer of help turns deadly.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: All News Is Local
programme.desc: In August 2000, 19-year-old Jessica Carpenter was found dead in her Aiken, SC home by her own mother. Local reporters and family members tell the story of a town frozen in terror as police search for a possible serial killer on the loose.

programme.title: The Knife in the Pocket
programme.desc: The sister of a domestic violence murder victim recounts her personal journey to understand her sister's death.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Betrayal in the Mountains
programme.desc: The discovery of the body of a young woman in the tree line of a popular camp site in the Rocky Mountains marks the beginning of a terrifying murder mystery.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: Killer Night Out
programme.desc: Bright and beautiful nurse's aide 19-year-old Janean Brown is found dead in a drainage ditch, her throat cut so deep she is almost decapitated. A riveting investigation will reveal a darker account of the night she died than anyone could have imagined.

programme.title: Vanity Fair Confidential: Intimations of Murder
programme.desc: When a young woman disappears in New York her family is convinced she's been murdered. But how do you catch an elusive killer when you can't prove the crime? Dedicated investigators are determined to find out what really happened.

programme.title: Vanity Fair Confidential: The Boy Who Cried Author
programme.desc: Young, cult author J.T. LeRoy's meteoric rise to literary stardom is truly remarkable. But it seems like the more books he sells, the more bizarre his behavior becomes.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Figure in the Shadows
programme.desc: A shocking crime jolts a small town when a young woman disappears and is later found dead. The last person seen with her-- a mysterious figure in camouflage. Investigators focus on several suspects, and one is convicted.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Death Before Dawn
programme.desc: In Orange County, California, screams of terror ring out from the home of multimillionaires. A series of clues lead the police on a hunt to find a wealthy couple's killer and bring justice to their five now orphaned children.

programme.title: Who Killed the Co-ed? An ID Murder Mystery
programme.desc: When 19-year-old college student Faith Hedgepeth is found brutally murdered in her off campus apartment, the evidence leads police to believe that she knew her killer. Six years later Faith's murderer is still at large.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: The Party Murders
programme.desc: Their evenings begin as fun celebrations with friends but they end in murder. With disturbing evidence, terrifying theories, and demands for justice.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: Brides and Murder
programme.desc: Two young brides-to-be are just beginning to plan their weddings when their dreams are tragically cut short. Find out if the desperate calls made to 911 reveal the truth about their shocking deaths.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Deep Wounds
programme.desc: San Diego police race to catch a killer with an unthinkable calling card.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Stolen Youth
programme.desc: A 14-year-old girl seeks solace online following her parents bitter divorce, when she meets a local girl who wants to help. After an apparent runaway, Hope's family receives a call that proves Hope didn't leave by choice.

programme.title: My Murder Story: Journey for Justice
programme.desc: On a deserted road in Arkansas, a man is gunned down in his car. As the case goes cold, the deceased man's daughter tries to track down the perpetrators of his murder until she finally gets a lead from another homicide thirteen years later.

programme.title: The Night That Didn't End: Enter Frame Left
programme.desc: When a young woman in Overland Park, Kansas disappears after a visit to the mall, investigators examine store surveillance footage and uncover a shocking abduction. Days later, the missing woman is found dead in the woods, exposing a horrific tragedy.

programme.title: Dead Silent: A Killer in the Swamp
programme.desc: A young woman relocates to the marshes of the Ocala National Forest in Florida in search of some peace and a fresh start, but what once appeared to be a remote paradise, soon shows its true colors.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Secret Prisons
programme.desc: The dark history of America's Secret Prisons is revealed.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Lockerbie Plot
programme.desc: An inquiry into whether Iran was really behind the Lockerbie Bombing, if the CIA invented and promoted suicide bombing in the Middle East, why there were no photos of Bin Laden's body and if 9/11 was actually an inside job.

programme.title: Greatest Tank Battles: The Battle of France
programme.desc: At the outset of WWII, the Germans pioneer a new form of mobile armoured warfare. This is the story of the famed Nazi Blitzkrieg, as thousands of panzers burst through terrain thought impassible to conquer Western Europe in a matter of weeks.

programme.title: Greatest Tank Battles: The Battle of Italy
programme.desc: In 1943, tanks of the Canadian Armoured Corps make their combat debut on the European mainland. This is the story of the Canadian tankers who fight their way up the Italian peninsula in the push to liberate Rome from Nazi occupation.

programme.title: Greatest Tank Battles: War Monsters: Tank Battles of Korea
programme.desc: In 1950 the world is caught off guard as North Korea launches a massive armoured assault into South Korea. This is the story of the American tankers who rush to the aid of the South and the bloody battles they fight up and down the Korean Peninsula.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Pearl Harbor
programme.desc: Experience the event that changed the war's course, hear the stories of those who were there and feel the momentum behind the attack that provoked the world's greatest superpower to join the Allied forces.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Victory in the Pacific
programme.desc: By the beginning of 1945, Japan's situation was desperate. Its navy and naval air power had effectively ceased to exist, while U.S. carriers and amphibious forces roamed at will across the Pacific Ocean, attacking Japanese-occupied islands.

programme.title: Tojo: Japan's Razor of Fear
programme.desc: Japanese General Hideki Tojo is a cold-blooded control freak, who takes millions to their deaths in the dirtiest war ever known. This is the story of the dictator responsible for Pearl Harbor, an Asian Holocaust and the torture of thousands of POWs.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Pearl Harbor
programme.desc: Experience the event that changed the war's course, hear the stories of those who were there and feel the momentum behind the attack that provoked the world's greatest superpower to join the Allied forces.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Victory in the Pacific
programme.desc: By the beginning of 1945, Japan's situation was desperate. Its navy and naval air power had effectively ceased to exist, while U.S. carriers and amphibious forces roamed at will across the Pacific Ocean, attacking Japanese-occupied islands.

programme.title: Tojo: Japan's Razor of Fear
programme.desc: Japanese General Hideki Tojo is a cold-blooded control freak, who takes millions to their deaths in the dirtiest war ever known. This is the story of the dictator responsible for Pearl Harbor, an Asian Holocaust and the torture of thousands of POWs.

programme.title: Greatest Tank Battles: War Monsters: Tank Battles of Korea
programme.desc: In 1950 the world is caught off guard as North Korea launches a massive armoured assault into South Korea. This is the story of the American tankers who rush to the aid of the South and the bloody battles they fight up and down the Korean Peninsula.

programme.title: Greatest Tank Battles: The Battle of Italy
programme.desc: In 1943, tanks of the Canadian Armoured Corps make their combat debut on the European mainland. This is the story of the Canadian tankers who fight their way up the Italian peninsula in the push to liberate Rome from Nazi occupation.

programme.title: Greatest Tank Battles: The Battle of France
programme.desc: At the outset of WWII, the Germans pioneer a new form of mobile armoured warfare. This is the story of the famed Nazi Blitzkrieg, as thousands of panzers burst through terrain thought impassible to conquer Western Europe in a matter of weeks.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Bat Masterson: Defender of Dodge
programme.desc: This well-dressed gunfighter was a gambler, a hunter, an Indian fighter, and a scout; but above all else, Bat Masterson was a lawman. As Sheriff of Ford County, Kansas, Bat Masterson kept the peace on the volatile Frontier.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Bass Reeves: The Real Lone Ranger
programme.desc: Bass Reeves is no ordinary lawman. A slave set free by the Civil War, he hunts outlaws in the most dangerous territory in the nation. There is striking evidence that this fearless, legendary rider is the basis for the iconic character of the Lone Ranger.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Butch Cassidy: The Perfect Criminal
programme.desc: Until the day he died, whenever that was, nobody ever outsmarted Butch Cassidy. He always got away. Cassidy was an outlaw who lived more by his wits than by his gun.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Designed for Power
programme.desc: Hitler's mastery of propaganda, and instinct for effective design, used to create everything from the swastika flag to the striking uniforms of the storm troopers, help win huge support for the Nazi party, a vital step in its march towards total power.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Hitler's Highways
programme.desc: Hitler promises to make Germany great again by creating 14,000 miles of freeway and building one and half million 'People's Cars' every year. Instead, the Nazi war economy relies on millions of forced labourers and prisoners.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Himmler's Empire of Terror
programme.desc: Hitler's bid for power depends on his most loyal, and violent supporters: the SS. Using surveillance, detention, and even murder, they defeat political enemies and are most responsible for putting Hitler's deadly policy of racial purity into practice.

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific: Waking the Beast
programme.desc: On December 7, 1941 Japan gambles all and attacks the US. In the first months of the war it looks as though Japan is unbeatable until the US fights back. The War in the Pacific engulfs Asia and launches an entirely new form of naval warfare.

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific: Island Warfare
programme.desc: By the summer of 1942, the US has the upper hand in the war with Japan. It has achieved naval superiority. In the spring of 1945 the loss of life is great for both sides but Japan refuses to surrender. US Chiefs desperately look for a way to end the way.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: U-Boat Terror
programme.desc: The global reach of the war reveals itself, as the incredible stories of those at sea are heard. Relentless attacks by U-Boats push the British to develop new strategies to defeat this evil empire.

programme.title: Alcatraz: Beyond the Rock
programme.desc: The world's most famous prison holds many secrets. We'll explore a conspiracy that helped three inmates escape, reveal the truth behind the dungeon of Alcatraz, and discover the remnants of a mysterious military outpost with links to Abraham Lincoln.

programme.desc: Lucas takes on the nearly impossible challenge to transform a tiny, suburban backyard into a luxurious, five-star resort-worthy pool space, hiding its secret identity as the ultimate sports and party fanatic's entertainment zone.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Dream Mulligan
programme.desc: Lucas is tasked with a challenging project: repair and remodel an unusable pool for a famous golfing family. Puzzled as to how this pool was even built, Lucas creates an ocean-themed pool with fire features, an infinity edge and his first water couch.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Castle by the Sea
programme.desc: Lucas faces an epic challenge building a pool fit for a Roman palace on the Gulf of Mexico. Lucas journeys far outside his comfort zone and even taps Emperor Caesar for help on his quest to fulfill his clients' dream of living in a castle by the sea.

programme.title: You Live in What?: Illinois Waterworks, Pennsylvania Lumber Warehouse, Texas Lighthouse
programme.desc: Take a tour of a 200-year-old hay barn turned home in the Connecticut woods and a Hudson Valley church transformed into an artists' sanctuary.

programme.title: You Live in What?: Bourbon Distillery, Carpet Cleaning Warehouse, Coal Commissary
programme.desc: Inventive owners convert historic buildings into one-of-a-kind homes. Explore a Kentucky bourbon distillery whose crumbling stone walls are now the centerpiece of an amazing country home.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Mountain Lodge Oasis
programme.desc: The Lucas Lagoons crew is asked to create a Rocky Mountain style lagoon for a family in the Florida wetlands. It doesn't take long before Lucas realises his clients will be watching him throughout the building process.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Paradise on the Bay
programme.desc: A couple from Snead Island, Florida asks the Lucas Lagoons crew to create a bayside paradise. This outdoor living space, pool, spa, fire feature and kitchen will be built without any of Lucas' signature rock work.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: In Hot Water
programme.desc: After ten years of saving and dreaming for a pool, a couple wants Lucas to build the wow factor. The crew creates a giant double-pool feature with a connecting stream and several customized surprises to deliver the 'wow' and dismiss any doubt.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Camp on Two Ponds
programme.desc: Chase and his team of Maine builders have been called in to renovate a camp uniquely located on two ponds. With winter right around the corner, Chase knows they need to hustle in order to complete the renovation.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Bunganuc Creek Landmark
programme.desc: The team take on an historic clammers' shack with a renovation that includes opening up boarded windows as well as clearing out animal droppings and years or trash and old machinery. Everyone in town watches as they work on the historic landmark.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Cabin for the YMCA
programme.desc: The Kennebec Valley YMCA in Augusta, Maine needs a new play structure and the Cabin Masters know just the crew for the job! Ryan decides to build a workshop for Chase. The team works feverishly to finish both projects before everything freezes over.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: The Hiltz Camp
programme.desc: Chase and his team are in the woods of New Sharon, Maine, to help Rod save his rundown camp from falling into the pristine Kimball Pond. He'd like to patch up the holes and get his wife to come back to the camp, which means a lot of hard work.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Family Fishing Cabin
programme.desc: The crew work to save an old cabin in Oakland, Maine, that Eric purchased from his father. He hopes the renovation will give the cabin many more years of life so he can shire his childhood memories there with his own children.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Fishing for a Fixer-Upper
programme.desc: Stephanie and Virginia's wish list for a vacation home in Galveston, TX, includes an elevated deck and close proximity to fishing. They're working with a local agent to help them reel in a winner, but permit problems and unforeseen issues threaten things.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Westport Wonder
programme.desc: An outdoor enthusiast couple loves spending time at the beach in Westport, WA, and decide to buy a vacation home. The house they choose needs a major overhaul, but their limited budget may prevent their planned renovation.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Out of Date in the Outer Banks
programme.desc: With two active children and busy jobs, Stacey and Doug are hoping to find a beach house in the Outer Banks of North Carolina to give their family a place to relax and recharge. They find a home, but it must be renovated from top to bottom.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Galveston Getaway
programme.desc: This couple is ready to find a beach home of their own after years of visiting relatives on the sunny shores of Galveston, TX. They find a house with potential but it's in need of serious work.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Carb Overload
programme.desc: Carb lovers around the world rejoice as Eddie Jackson gears up for generous spreads and carb-on-carb dishes guaranteed to make the mouth water and the jaw drop.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: United Tastes of America
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson is the guide on a mouthwatering trip to sample all the classic, iconic dishes of America. From delicious desserts on the Florida coast to spicy-hot chili in the Lone Star State, this is the best way to experience the USA.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Back to School
programme.desc: We're going back to school to learn once and for all what the ultimate nostalgic dish is. We're joining Chef Beau MacMillan in the cafeteria with his Supreme Boffa super-sub sandwich.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Layers Of Goodness
programme.desc: Get ready to pile it on thick as we're talking layers of goodness that are stacked to the ceiling. We take a trip to Chicago where we meet up with Jeff Mauro to discover all the magic colors hidden inside the rainbow cake.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: The Hole Truth (Donuts)
programme.desc: Alton Brown takes us on a trip to Memphis to honor the original glazed doughnut that started it all.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: I'll Have What They're Having
programme.desc: Antonia Lofaso falls in love with a sourdough cinnamon roll in Los Angeles.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: New Hampshire Seacoast
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores New Hampshire's seacoast and finds that the bounty of the local waters is the star of the local cuisine, such as shrimp, scallops and haddock stuffed in a baked lobster and loaded into a chowder.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Dallas
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores the big and bold flavors that are decidedly Dallas. From comforting chicken fried steak and sweet, creamy pecan pie to hearty tortilla soup and steak aged for 240 days.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Chiang Mai
programme.desc: Andrew reveals the most iconic foods of Chiang Mai, Thailand. From coconut curry soup to a signature sausage with pork and chile paste, fish roasted in banana leaves to minced pork salad, the northern city has a regional cuisine unlike any other.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Phnom Penh
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern discovers the complex flavors of Phnom Penh, Cambodia. Spicy grilled crab, cold and refreshing beef salad and herbaceous fish and noodle soup reflect a mission to preserve the uniqueness of Cambodian cuisine.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: Iowa
programme.desc: Andrew discovers a world of unexpected flavors in the middle of America's heartland when he makes a visit to Iowa! From head cheese and pickled onion to a Sudanese stew, Andrew finds out that there's a lot more than meat and potatoes on the table in Iowa!

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: Detroit
programme.desc: With a menu that includes everything from iconic soul food like short ribs and ox tails, to a restaurant serving up lamb brain sandwiches in the heart of Arab America, to a local man known for his longstanding muskrat recipe.

programme.title: Man v. Food Nation: Boston, MA
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels to historic Boston, Massachusetts, for some epic New England eats and a 4.5-pound Irish breakfast challenge at Flann O'Brien's Pub.

programme.title: Man v. Food Nation: Burlington, VT
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels to the small town of Burlington, Vermont, for some mammoth eats, including a beer-infused bagel feast and a 3.5-pound breakfast sandwich challenge.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Charleston, SC
programme.desc: Casey heads to Charleston, SC, for some epic low country eats. He takes on the belt buster challenge where he must consume a two-pound burger, three pounds of nachos, a hulking order of tater tots and a 12-ounce milkshake in 20 minutes.

programme.title: Man v. Food: New York, NY
programme.desc: Casey travels to New York City for the best in big city eats, including an insane challenge that has him choosing between a 151-ounce milkshake, an eight-pound sloppy joe or six habanero ghost chili wings.
