programme.desc: Our pals need to get Minnie a surprise present, so they keep her busy with plenty of chores to do at the Clubhouse. Tired from so much work, Minnie falls asleep and dreams that she is Minnie-rella.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Donald Jr.
programme.desc: Donald needs help teaching his young duckling prodigy Donald Jr. how to do the steps to a special song and dance routine.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Goofy's Coconutty Monkey
programme.desc: Coco the Monkey is planning to have a Coconutty Milk Party for everyone.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Goofy on Mars
programme.desc: Goofy crash-lands on Mars and it's up to the Sensational Six to save him.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Mickey's Happy Mousekeday
programme.desc: It's Mickey's birthday and the Clubhouse gang has organized fun activities for the big Mousekeday.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Mickey's Springtime Surprise
programme.desc: Celebrating the first day of spring, Mickey and Minnie organize an egg hunt.

programme.title: Movie: Mickey's Adventures in Wonderland
programme.desc: While trying to help Donald find a present for Daisy, Mickey ends up in a wonderland.

programme.title: Bluey: Squash / Charades / Bingo
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo help Uncle Stripe and Bandit play squash, spend the day with Nana, and Bingo has to learn to play alone!

programme.title: Dino Ranch: Small Wonder/ Dino Check-up Hiccup
programme.desc: The Cassidy family lives in a world with dinosaurs.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Luna's Cosmic Tantrum/ Motsuki The Best
programme.desc: Motsuki becomes Owelette's sidekick; Motsuki traps Luna Girl on the moon.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Master of the Moat/PJ Robot Vs Romeo
programme.desc: Romeo captures a special crystal and becomes Master of the Sky. PJ Robot and Romeo must work together when the Flying Factory is damaged.

programme.title: Bluey: Ice Cream/ Bad Mood/ Double Babysitter
programme.desc: The adventures of Bluey, a loveable puppy who lives with her parents and little sister.

programme.title: Bluey: Horsey Ride / Hotel / Bike
programme.desc: Muffin's cousin Socks takes Bluey's favourite toy; Bluey and Bingo play Hotel; Bluey tries to learn to ride her bike.

programme.title: Doc McStuffins: Runaway Love/ Tour De McStuffins
programme.desc: Doc's little brother Donny worries that the arrival of the new baby will take attention away from him, so he hatches a plan to run away. Meanwhile, Doc is so busy helping her parents prepare for the new baby that Lambie also starts to feel left out.

programme.title: Doc McStuffins: Let the Nightingale Sing
programme.desc: When Doc is reading a book about the famous nurse Florence Nightingale, Doc's magic takes her and the toys to England in the 1800's. Doc meets Florence, who befriends Doc. Doc shares her secret with her and brings Florence's toys to life.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Puggy-ology/ Squirrels Just Wanna Have Fun
programme.desc: The pugs travel to an archeology site to find artifacts for Bob's sister. Then, when a noisy squirrel keeps Bob from getting work done, the pugs must work together to get the squirrel back to its family.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: The Gift/ Theo Knows Best
programme.desc: Theodore gives Dave an ugly handmade vest for his birthday and insists he wear it to an upcoming business meeting. When Theodore finds a winning lottery ticket, everyone has their own ideas on how the money should be spent.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: The Fugitives/ Sherlock Chipmunk

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Tour Bus/ Game Show
programme.desc: When Alvin talks Dave into buying a used tour bus, Dave has no idea of the problems ahead. Alvin signs the Chipmunks up for a game show that forces losing contestants to perform dangerous stunts.

programme.title: It's Pony: Dad's Speech/ School Dance
programme.desc: Annie tries to help Dad work through his stage fright by encouraging him to be more like Pony. Everyone is dreading the Valentine's school dance, so Annie and Pony try to get it cancelled.

programme.desc: Timmy wishes for a magic remote control that will allow him to travel through television.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Abra Catastrophe

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Wishology: The Final Ending

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: The App/ Don Juan Theodoro

programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick take a friendship test. Pearl is embarrassed when she must sit next to SpongeBob in the Tunnel of Glove.

programme.title: Lidia's Kitchen

programme.title: Christina Cooks: Back to the Cutting Board: Eating Well on a Budget
programme.desc: Budget-friendly recipes include simmered tofu and vegetables, sweet corn fritters and apple cranberry crisp.

programme.title: Christopher Kimball's Milk Street: Indian Classics at Home
programme.desc: We feature favourite Indian recipes for the home kitchen. Recipes include Butter Chicken, using cashews.

programme.title: Best of the Joy of Painting
programme.desc: The late Bob Ross instructs the painting hobbyist while offering words of encouragement.

programme.title: Paint This With Jerry Yarnell: Beyond the Wall

programme.title: Fit 2 Stitch: The Basic Blouse Modified!
programme.desc: The changes done to the blouse, allow us to get a different look every time we sew this blouse.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Fagin

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Army of One

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Fork in the Road
programme.desc: When Lindsay receives a panicked phone call from her mother, Bunny, whose boyfriend has just been shot, Lindsay must figure out the best way to approach the situation as her mother is now the main suspect.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Reform
programme.desc: The district is in a state of change, Lindsay has moved to New York and the CPD is under scrutiny about the corrupt nature of its institution. The team attempts to bust a gun deal that quickly turns dicey when innocent people get involved.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: The Thing About Heroes
programme.desc: After a van explodes during a Chicago street festival, Muslim patrol officer Frank Toma goes missing and evidence piles up pointing to his involvement, but Burgess is desperate to prove his innocence.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Promise
programme.desc: When a young Latina woman is brutally murdered, Intelligence suspects she may have been working as a drug mule.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Snitch
programme.desc: While investigating a drug related homicide, Intelligence is stonewalled by the 'no snitch' culture of the neighborhood.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Home
programme.desc: When Intelligence busts a meth lab run by gang leader Marshall Carter, they uncover a rehoming scam in which children adopted from foreign countries are abandoned, then sold online.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Favor, Affection, Malice or Ill-Will
programme.desc: When Lindsay is tipped off about a grieving father looking to avenge his daughter's death, Olinsky goes undercover as a hitman-for-hire. Meanwhile, Ruzek comes back after finishing his undercover assignment, only to have Voight knock him down to patrol.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Emotional Proximity
programme.desc: Olinsky's daughter remains in critical condition following a massive fire, leaving Intelligence on edge, but more determined than ever to track down the suspect.

programme.desc: Monk solves a Halloween murder as he and his brother await the arrival of their long lost father.

programme.title: Monk: Mr. Monk Stays in Bed

programme.title: Movie: Armageddon
programme.desc: A drill rigger and his crew embark on a mission to blow up an asteroid heading for Earth.

programme.title: Movie: The Maze Runner
programme.desc: A boy wakes up in an ascending elevator with no memory of who he is or how he got there. He joins a group of other boys trapped in an enclosed area surrounded by an enormous maze. His only hope for escape is by piecing together clues about his past.

programme.title: Movie: The Hunger Games
programme.desc: In the future, the Capitol selects a boy and a girl from the twelve districts to fight to the death on television. Katniss volunteers to take her sister's place for the latest match.

programme.title: Bones: The Finger in the Nest
programme.desc: Booth's son finds a severed corpse finger in a bird's nest that leads to the discovery of a veterinarian's body. When the victim's fatal injuries are found to be from a dog, the team uncovers an illegal dog-fighting ring.

programme.title: Bones: The Perfect Pieces in the Purple Pond
programme.desc: When a shocked teenager finds a dismembered body lying in pieces in a strange purple pool of water, Brennan and Booth come to the scene only to find the victim's head is missing. The team discovers the body is that of a man with severe OCD.

programme.title: Bones: The Crank in the Shaft
programme.desc: When the remains of a much-disliked company office manager are found in a building elevator shaft, Booth and Brennan must find out which one of the employees had reason to murder the victim.

programme.title: Bones: The He in the She
programme.desc: Skeletal remains are found in the Chesapeake Bay. Only the upper torso of the victim is intact and the team has little to work from besides the victim's breast implants. The lower half of the torso is found and the team's assumptions are proved wrong.

programme.title: Movie: Beauty and the Beast
programme.desc: A young woman named Belle longs to leave her tiny village. When she discovers her father is missing, she finds him as a prisoner of a Beast. She takes his place and lives at the castle, drawing closer to Beast but unaware of the approaching danger.

programme.title: Movie: The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: A bounty hunter, who has suffered a string of bad luck, learns that his next target is his ex-wife, who jumped bail in order to follow a lead on a murder case.

programme.title: Arrow: Vendetta
programme.desc: As Oliver and Helena grow closer, Oliver trains her to be his ally, complete with showing her how to use a crossbow. Oliver refuses to listens to Diggle's concerns that maybe Helena can't be trusted.

programme.title: Arrow: Year's End
programme.desc: Determined to make up for lost time and restore a sense of normalcy to the Queen household, Oliver decides to throw the family a Christmas party. Meanwhile, Tommy asks Laurel to spend Christmas with him but she feels she needs to be with her father.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: End of the Line
programme.desc: A gruesome copycat murder on a street car reopens a former case for Wade, evoking painful memories from her past.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: The Last Stand
programme.desc: Pride's long-time friend, state and military attorney asks NCIS to investigate the disappearance of a JAG lawyer who specializes in classified cases and volunteers at a private military academy.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Swift, Silent, Deadly
programme.desc: A highly credentialed and skilled Special Ops Marine sends Pride and the team on a city-wide manhunt after he assaults six men in a bar.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Slay the Dragon
programme.desc: Tammy is reunited with her ex-husband, who disappeared after embezzling $80 million in Katrina relief funds, after he is linked to the murder of a crime boss' son.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Quid Pro Quo
programme.desc: While investigating a deadly accident at a naval base, the NCIS team finds out a unit of Seabees was poisoned with a contagious supervirus. Also, during an autopsy, Wade is infected with the virus and given hours to live if an antidote can't be found.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: NOLA Confidential
programme.desc: After the NCIS team uncovers a link between a drug ring and the New Orleans Police Department, Lasalle must investigate his former partner in the Vice unit. Also, Pride worries about Rita's safety as she looks into illegal activity in Clearwater.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Krewe
programme.desc: While Pride listens in on a wiretap of Mayor Hamilton, the NCIS team investigates a train heist of hundreds of Navy weapons.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Knockout
programme.desc: After the Belle Chase Navy Chaplain and pastor at Clearwater Baptist is murdered, Pride believes he found a connection between Mayor Hamilton and the illegal activity taking place in Clearwater. Also, Percy continues to face repercussions from a case.

programme.title: Movie: Just Friends
programme.desc: A formerly overweight record producer returns to his hometown for the holidays after a 10-year absence only to compete against a former classmate for the affections of the girl he loved in high school.

programme.title: Movie: The Ugly Truth
programme.desc: A morning talk show producer is appalled by the chauvinistic host that her boss has recently hired. The new host challenges all of her beliefs in relationships but she takes his advice when she finds herself in a new relationship.

programme.title: Movie: The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: A bounty hunter, who has suffered a string of bad luck, learns that his next target is his ex-wife, who jumped bail in order to follow a lead on a murder case.

programme.title: Movie: Legion

programme.title: Movie: Hancock
programme.desc: An alcoholic superhero, that alienates the public as he saves their lives, has a chance encounter with a public relations person.

programme.title: Movie: Bad Boys
programme.desc: Two hip Miami undercover detectives have 72 hours to nab the crooks who stole millions in recovered heroin from the police station.

programme.title: Movie: Bad Boys II
programme.desc: Narcotics detectives Mike Lowrey and Marcus Burnett have been assigned to a high-tech task force that is investigating the flow of designer ecstasy into Miami. Their inquiries inadvertently lead them to a major conspiracy involving a vicious kingpin.

programme.title: Movie: Platoon

programme.title: Ride With Norman Reedus: The North Island of New Zealand with Josh Brolin
programme.desc: Norman Reedus explores the harbor city of Auckland before meeting up with actor Josh Brolin. Together they discover a rich native Maori culture and an affinity for moto sports amongst the stunning North Island landscape.

programme.desc: When a millionaire is convicted of fraud, he's given 30 days to get his affairs in order before doing time in San Quentin. Terrified of what prison life has in store for him, he hires his black friend to prep him for the experience.

programme.desc: Alan and Chelsea become best buds and Charlie decides to take advantage of the situation.

programme.desc: Dorothy resists pressure to pass a failing student-athlete and Rose accuses her dentist.

programme.title: The Office: Goodbye, Toby

programme.title: Movie: The Long Island Serial Killer: A Mother's Hunt for Justice
programme.desc: A mother's search for the truth behind what happened to her daughter, a sometime escort who disappeared after a ‘date’ on Long Island.

programme.title: Movie: No One Would Tell
programme.desc: Issues of emotional and physical abusive teen relationships are explored. A mother is thrilled when her daughter dates a popular and charismatic teen but it soon becomes clear the boyfriend has a dark, possessive side.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Siegfried & Roy: The Tiger Attack (Part 1)
programme.desc: In 2003, the wildly successful careers of master illusionists Siegfried & Roy comes to a shockingly abrupt end when one of the team’s prized tigers bites Roy Horn on the neck and drags him offstage.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Siegfried & Roy: Dangerous Illusion (Part 2)
programme.desc: Roy tries to recover from severe wounds inflicted by his beloved tiger Mantacore, but the team’s excuses for the animal’s behavior lose credibility upon further investigation.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Yosemite Murders: The Missing Women (Part 1)
programme.desc: When in 1999, young women mysteriously disappear from Yosemite National Park, investigators determine foul play and a prime suspect emerges, then escapes.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Yosemite Murders: The Evil Side (Part 2)
programme.desc: The key suspect in the murder of young women in Yosemite National Park is caught, but it’s up to an exceptionally skilled FBI agent to dismantle his web of lies and denials to draw a confession.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Line of Fire
programme.desc: A fundamentalist group starts attacking and robbing banks in the Pacific Northwest.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bad Blood
programme.desc: A young doctor in a rural community is accused of sedating and sexually assaulting two of his female patients. DNA tests demonstrate that the doctor is innocent, but the women continue to insist that he sedated and raped them.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pure Evil
programme.desc: In 1993, two Texas teenagers, a 14-year-old boy and his 13-year-old stepsister, were brutally murdered. It took forensic evidence and a behavioral profile to identify their killer as Jason Massey, who had a history of torturing animals.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Root of All Evil
programme.desc: Prosecutors turned to a plant pathologist and a dendrochronologist to solve a missing person's case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: House Call
programme.desc: A respected surgeon in an upscale waterfront apartment community is murdered.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Marathon Man
programme.desc: When a man's body is found near the ranch his family owns, his wife claims he went jogging. But police doubt that story.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Once Bitten
programme.desc: Ray Krone was known throughout Arizona as the snaggletooth killer. An unusual bite-mark on a murdered woman resulted in his conviction and death sentence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All Wet
programme.desc: When one woman's drowning death in Pennsylvania triggers another investigation into a woman's eerily similar death in North Carolina, medical examiners must determine if the women drowned or were in fact murdered.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Memories
programme.desc: A pregnant woman is brutally attacked in her own home and her unborn child is killed. After coming out of her coma, and regaining her memory, she identifies her husband as the perpetrator. A new DNA test lead investigators to a different suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Material Evidence
programme.desc: Examine intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Second Shot at Love
programme.desc: A respected heart surgeon is found dead in the basement of his upscale Cincinnati home and have police assuming he committed suicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Journey to Justice
programme.desc: Prosecutor used video testimony to link drunk driver to hit-and-run which killed a child.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tooth or Consequences
programme.desc: An investigation into the disappearance of a young woman uncovers a tooth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sniffing Revenge
programme.desc: Unexpected death appears to be foul play but that is refuted after autopsy is performed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Plastic Fire
programme.desc: Police say that a car crash, which killed an elderly woman, was murder and arson. The driver, the victim’s daughter, insisted it was an accident.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Last Will
programme.desc: A kidnapper torments an abducted girl's family with phone calls.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sleight of Hand
programme.desc: Investigators search for an assailant who has avoided the law for sixteen years.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Scratching the Surface
programme.desc: Forensic scientists must find a way to "lift" the serial number from a 12-gauge shotgun.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Slippery Motives
programme.desc: While staying at a hotel in St. Louis, Missouri, a Louisiana woman drowns in a bathtub. Her husband claims it was an accident, but detectives are skeptical as they discover evidence of foul play.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Badge of Deceit

programme.title: Forensic Files: Photo Finish

programme.title: Forensic Files: Whodunit
programme.desc: An evening out to a murder mystery theatre turns into a real life whodunit.

programme.desc: With added scenes and bonus content: Rick bets on a new stretch of land, Parker confronts Brennan over a missed chance and Tony digs up a relic.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Attack or Retreat
programme.desc: After a key piece of equipment dies, Fred decides if it's time to pull the plug. Parker's crew struggle to keep up their breakneck pace when a conveyor belt goes down. Rick prospects some of the richest ground he's ever mined.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Monster Machines
programme.desc: The washplants featured on Gold Rush have trapped more than $18 million in gold since 2010, but find out which monster machine has captured the most. We review them all to find out.

programme.desc: Scott and some old running mates team up for a 2v2 challenge for giant bass.

programme.desc: We show you great trout fishing during winter months in West Virginia.

programme.desc: Gary is targeting smallmouth bass on northern inland lakes in Wisconsin.

programme.title: Chasin' the Sun: Chilly Micro Skinny
programme.desc: When overnight temps go low and the tides go lower, it forces Redfish to move. Justin and Travis break out a new micro-skiff to see how low they can go to ambush shifting redfish on the flats.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: The Real Robin Hood
programme.desc: Josh criss-crosses the English countryside in search of the real Robin Hood.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: The Quest for King Arthur

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Corsica's Nazi Treasure

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Viking Secrets
programme.desc: Josh investigates how a group of Norse tribesman gained power in medieval Europe. His search begins in their one-time home base of Denmark and continues on to the first place they expanded off continent, the remote island of Iceland.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Vikings in America

programme.desc: Josh ventures to Argentina, where many Nazi SS officers escaped to after World War II.

programme.title: Flipping Vegas: Condo From Hell
programme.desc: Scott buys a tiny condo unit in a low-income neighborhood, but soon finds out the payoff isn't going to come easy.

programme.title: Flipping Vegas: Fire House

programme.title: Flipping Vegas: Home Made Presents: Day Care House
programme.desc: When Scott buys a former day care he discovers that making a profit on it isn't going to be child's play.

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping: The School House
programme.desc: When the team finds a ramshackle house down the street from a brand-new school opening in a couple months, they see a chance to cash in by creating a family-friendly oasis.

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping: The Waterlogged Cabin
programme.desc: A 'lurker' Zombie seems great initially, but has a lot of water damage under the surface. The team must battle against continuous rainfall in order to ensure their upgrades don't get washed away, which means a major revamp of the roof.

programme.title: The First 48: Stray Shot
programme.desc: When a stray shot leaves an innocent man dead in his home, Tulsa detectives discover a neighborhood under siege by young terrors.

programme.title: The First 48: Life Interrupted/ Lucifer
programme.desc: In Atlanta, a young man comes home for lunch and is murdered when he catches a brazen thief in the act. Then, in Tulsa, an ongoing feud between two gang members leads to a fateful encounter.

programme.title: I Survived a Crime
programme.desc: A brave grandma fights two carjackers, and a homeowner turns the tables on an armed gang with a machete.

programme.title: I Survived a Crime
programme.desc: A local restaurant encounters violence when a grandmother is ripped off, and a woman takes on the man who slammed into her van.

programme.title: Movie: Snitch
programme.desc: In order to free his son, who was framed during a drug deal, a father goes undercover for the DEA.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Blind Justice
programme.desc: Find out why the Jokers killed the idea of Joe going shirtless in the boxing ring, and which of the Jokers loves dancing but is no good at it.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Running of the Bullies
programme.desc: Find out which Joker's waiter experience made meal or no meal a breeze, why there was a white noise machine needed during dust bunnies and who issued a siren warning right after Sal's pool punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: To Hatch a Predator
programme.desc: A last-minute prop request that caused a scramble, where Murr’s fetching housecoat came from, and who was offered a job at the children’s museum following Q’s turtle punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Vampire Weakened
programme.desc: The guys act frosty while working the ice cream counter, then take Joe's dogs for a romp in the park with help from some strangers. Later, tonight's loser watches his blood boil while performing with a gospel choir.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Crickets
programme.desc: The perfect place to film an IJ challenge. The customers after consuming Q's hot dog smoothie.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Stage Fright
programme.desc: The guys serve up raw deals at a pawn shop counter and try to convince strangers to give them hugs. Plus, tonight's loser performs his life story through song.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Laundry Day
programme.desc: The guys look for partners in crime at a supermarket and throw caution to the wind as helpless romantics. Plus, tonight’s loser has a serious wardrobe malfunction.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Mime and Punishment
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q put the nasty in namaste when they lead guided meditations. Tonight's big loser gets boxed in with a 24-hour punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Junk in the Trunk
programme.desc: Find out which two Jokers know how to practice transcendental meditation and which boy band member the guys met at Carnegie Deli.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Baggage Shame
programme.desc: Find out how Murr's old neighbour learns a little TMI about his personal life and which of the jokers Joe would want by his side in a fight.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Walking Dread
programme.desc: Find out which joker has a black thumb, what challenges the guys like so much they play when the cameras are off, and how long it took to zombie-fry the undead in Sal's sewer punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Party Crasher
programme.desc: Find out which jokers were in on the surprise Gary Busey appearance, where the phrase 'tit for tat' came from, and how Murr's big mouth backfired on him, leading to this Statue of Liberty punishment.

programme.title: Movie: Dumb and Dumber To
programme.desc: Dimwitted pals Harry and Lloyd are reunited after 20 years. When an old postcard informs Harry that he fathered a child, he and Lloyd set out to find his daughter, who was put up for adoption.

programme.title: Movie: Dumb and Dumber To
programme.desc: Dimwitted pals Harry and Lloyd are reunited after 20 years. When an old postcard informs Harry that he fathered a child, he and Lloyd set out to find his daughter, who was put up for adoption.

programme.desc: Murr, Q, Sal and Joe try a dish they've never eaten, and a special guest stops by. Plus, Q drops a world premiere music video for his diabolical new song.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The Holiday Meals Episode
programme.desc: Murr, Q, Sal and Joe reminisce about their Christmas past. Joe surprises everyone with a holiday-themed wardrobe request.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Card Against Humanity
programme.desc: Q, Murr, Joe and Sal have customers seeing red while working at an optician's office, then get too close for comfort eavesdropping on strangers' conversations. Plus, the big loser gives the business at a networking event.

programme.title: TruTV's Top Funniest: Big Time Blunders

programme.title: TruTV's Top Funniest: Fails, Falls, and Follie
programme.desc: Find out what happens when a reporter gets busted ordering at a drive-thru on live TV.

programme.title: TruTV's Top Funniest: Masters of Disasters

programme.title: TruTV's Top Funniest: Silly Behaviour
programme.desc: Witness an epic elevator prank, the best game of ping pong since Forrest Gump and a colossal showdown between chameleon and cell phone.

programme.desc: Michael feeds a cannibalistic plant at a garden center, and at the tuxedo store, he sells a tie that literally suits itself. Plus, at a hockey rink, Michael's assistant is speechless with a trick so electric it melts the ice.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Fight or Flight
programme.desc: While working in a cheese store, Michael milks the reaction of a woman stunned by breeding brie. Later, Michael nails down the perfect app in a salon and unpacks a trick in an airport that ruffles his assistant's feathers.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Fright at the Museum
programme.desc: At a campsite, Michael turns rain into wine and has an app that gives new meaning to the 'call of nature.' Later, Michael gets thorny at a plant shop, and in a museum, he drums up ancient history that grasps for the present.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Daredevils 4

programme.desc: Viola Field's fall from grace as a successful television journalist has left her looking for control in her life. When her son announces his engagement to a working-class woman, Viola sets out to ruin her son's marriage before it gets started.

programme.title: Rob and Chyna: Baby Bump in the Road
programme.desc: Rob feels he finally has his life back on track, but when Chyna is less than supportive, Rob deletes his social media and blocks Chyna from his phone.

programme.desc: With the Kardashian's urging, Rob reluctantly agrees to therapy. Meanwhile Chyna pursues a paternity test for her unborn child.

programme.title: Rob and Chyna: Baby Special
programme.desc: Go behind closed doors to witness what happens when new couple Rob Kardashian and Blac Chyna embark on building a life together as a newly engaged couple with a baby on the way.

programme.title: For Real: The Story of Reality TV: First Look
programme.desc: A first look at the new series 'For Real: The Story of Reality TV'.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Khloé's New Breast Friends
programme.desc: Kim finds herself in a major ordeal when she unknowingly upsets her mom after helping Cait get ready for the ESPY awards. Meanwhile, Khloé tests out life with bigger breasts, and Scott searches for a healthy way to keep himself occupied.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Lord Disick Returns
programme.desc: The family heads to San Diego for MJ's birthday, but Rob bails and goes missing after a fight with Chyna. Meanwhile, Scott goes to great lengths to resurrect the Lord after much prodding from the family, and Kim struggles with doing North's hair.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Lord of the Cougars
programme.desc: Kendall suffers from sleep paralysis, which threatens her work and travel life. Meanwhile, Kim searches for methods to control her anxiety and Scott develops an unlikely friendship with Kris and her girlfriends.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Controversies and Legacies
programme.desc: Kim's decision to try for a third child proves to be a matter of life and death. Meanwhile Kendall fears backlash from supporting stricter gun control, and Kris gets emotional upon recognizing her mom won't be around forever.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: No Good Deeds
programme.desc: With Rob's baby only a month away, the family is excited to celebrate and go all out to plan a baby shower for the couple, but, when Rob and Chyna get into a fight, the party is ruined.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Time to Dash
programme.desc: During a trip to Miami, a major department store makes an offer to buy Dash that leads to Kim, Kourtney, and Khloé arguing about the store's future. Later, Kourtney struggles to enjoy herself around Scott and Khloé keeps her new relationship from Kim.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Paris
programme.desc: Kourtney is eager to experience Paris Fashion Week with Kim and see Kendall walk the runway for the first time, but their trip to the city of love takes a dark turn when Kim is robbed at gunpoint.

programme.title: The Daily Pop: The 2021 Grammy Awards
programme.desc: The hosts give their prediction of who will be the big winners at this year's Grammy Awards.

programme.title: Modern Family: Crazy Train
programme.desc: Dede is getting remarried, and Manny convinces the family to take the train up to her wedding.

programme.title: Modern Family: Double Click
programme.desc: Claire can't seem to find the right time to fire one of her employees, while back at home Phil thinks he caught Luke with a girl in his bed, and no one seems to notice that Alex has moved back home for the summer.

programme.title: Modern Family: A Tale of Three Cities
programme.desc: The Pritchett-Dunphy-Tucker clan reunites with all of the families converging at home for Father's Day.

programme.title: Modern Family: A Stereotypical Day
programme.desc: Jay does not want to give the new family moving in across the street the wrong impression and goes out of his way to make sure they know he is the best kind of neighbour.

programme.title: Modern Family: Blindsided
programme.desc: The Dunphys and Pritchetts are going head-to-head when Luke decides his best chance at getting into college is running for senior class president against Manny. Meanwhile, Cam finds his star football player is moving away and makes a rash decision.

programme.title: Modern Family: Weathering Heights
programme.desc: Phil can't cover up his excitement when he's invited to appear in a real-estate news segment for the local news. The day gets even better after meeting his 'weatherman' hero, Rainer Shine.

programme.title: Modern Family: Halloween 4: The Revenge of Rod Skyhook
programme.desc: Luke’s Halloween party isn’t the monster bash he dreamed of, and he is at risk of having the worst party of the year.

programme.title: Modern Family: Grab It
programme.desc: Jay's favourite place in the world, may be losing some of its charm when Phil considers becoming a member. At the Dunphy house, Claire mistakes her influence on Alex's life choices, and Hayley cares too much about what Alex thinks about hers.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Northern Southern
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is grabbing Southern flavour without ever hittin' the South. In Cambridge, Mass., a funky joint fryin' up Nashville hot chicken and cookin' up gangster gumbo. A smokin' spot in Sparks, Nev.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: All Over the Map
programme.desc: Guys visits Phoenix for authentic Mexican tacos and Seattle for a Greek restaurant serving gyros and flaming cheese.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Old Time Favorites
programme.desc: Guy checks out places that are keeping the past alive. In Idaho, a landmark is serving up big plates, in Portland an old school lunch counter offers grilled cheese and in Miami, a family cooks up seafood like they did in Cuba.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Fillin' Up in Florence
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's hitting up totally traditional Italian spots in Florence, Italy. First, the 50-year-old landmark serving up their legendary spaghetti specialty and some crazy good chicken.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Regional Recipes
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri's diving into dishes with righteous regional flavour. In San Antonio, an East Coast-Texas deli mashup pilin' up smoked meat sensations, an inspiring Creole spot serving legit gumbo and fried pork chops.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Keepin' It Real
programme.desc: In Miami, Florida, the Asian fusion spot delivers the bomb dot com brussels sprouts, and goes all out ducky on the sous vide sammie.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Sammies and Spice
programme.desc: Guy Fieri visits Longmont, Colorado to check out what they're doing with cauliflower and pork burgers. In Columbus, Ohio, a Chicago-style restaurant makes Italian beef and gyros. Aarti Sequeira and Jet Tila meet Guy in Los Angeles for fiery Thai.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Far-Flung Flavor
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's heading out to grab flavour from far and wide. In Santa Fe, N.M., a Southwest-Middle Eastern quick stop slingin' the shawarma and salmon souvlaki. In Kansas City, Missouri, a funky joint serving up outrageous Scandinavian specialties.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Meat Sampler
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's digging into all kinds of different meats on this trip. In Ottawa, Canada, a carnivore haven stackin' sandwiches with dynamite duck and a pork trifecta. In Richmond, Va., a taco joint loading up out-of-bounds oxtail.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Wonder Women
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's visiting an all-female lineup that's rockin' the house. In Houston, a grandma's firing up family recipes like homemade tamales and chile rellenos with a twist. In Orlando, Florida, a funky spot is focused on making meatball masterpieces.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: BBQ, Pubs and Local Grub
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is hittin' up BBQ joints and pubs and checkin' out the local grub. In Pacifica, Calif., he revisits an old barbecue buddy to check out his take on pork ribs and a new spin on an old standby.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Traditional Gone Wild
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's digging into some dishes like mama made, if she had a wild imagination.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Open 24/7
programme.desc: Guy Fieri goes 'round the clock at some places with great food at any hour of the day.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Old to New
programme.desc: Guy's in for some old school favourites and new school stunners.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Family Legacies
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's visiting spots keeping up with their family ties. In Pleasantville, N.J., a wife carries on her husband's legacy with his down-home chicken and waffles and righteous ribs. In Colorado Springs, family recipes are made at a BBQ joint.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Kansas City Barbecue Tour
programme.desc: An award-winning BBQ master serves up the Kansas City special: burnt ends.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cook Like a Pro: Make-Ahead Desserts
programme.desc: Ina's cutting straight to sweet with delicious make-ahead and very professional fruit desserts. There's a twist on a classic with apple pie bars, then pure comfort meets wow factor in chocolate banana cream pie.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cook Like a Pro: Perfect Pastry
programme.desc: Ina Garten shares tips and ideas for cooking with sweet, savory and even store-bought pastry. She starts with her foolproof sweet pastry dough for a showstopping French fig tart. She uses a shortcut to make spinach in puff pastry.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Supermarket Swaps
programme.desc: Inspired by the show 'Supermarket Stakeout,' the hosts are swapping grocery bags and making exciting new dishes. Katie Lee starts with spicy pecan-crusted chicken thighs with Sunny's groceries. Sunny uses Geoffrey's groceries to make bread pudding.

programme.title: Giada Entertains: Jade's Feel Good Party
programme.desc: Giada De Laurentiis serves a healthy, kid-friendly lunch for her daughter Jade and friends after a yoga and stretching class.

programme.title: Giada Entertains: The Art of Surprise
programme.desc: Giada De Laurentiis pulls off the ultimate surprise birthday party for a dear friend, featuring glittery decor and quiz-style party games.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Home Sweet Home: Just for Two
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is making recipes just for two. For sharing, there's a juicy Cajun t-bone steak with lemon pepper shoestring fries. She also makes a sheet pan dinner of spicy peanut chicken and broccoli, plus dulce de leche lava cakes.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Home Sweet Home: Easy Eats
programme.desc: Ree Drummond cooks super easy eats with her kids, starting with a fabulous foursome of wafflewiches: turkey bacon, reuben, roast beef and fluffernutter. Plus, Ree makes shortcut homemade ravioli, a stunning blackberry icebox cake and an omelet in a mug.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Starch Madness
programme.desc: The Kitchen's epic, starch-filled menu leaves no carb behind. It starts off with beer cheese soup in a bread bowl with kielbasa 'Croutons' and then includes a pierogi pizza, fettuccine alfredo pie and a fun pasta personality test.

programme.title: Guy's Ranch Kitchen: Old-School Vegas

programme.desc: The Georgia Aquarium sends a team to Cape Town, South Africa to help rehabilitate and release a group of African penguins into the wild. A dive team installs a shipwreck feature into the Ocean Voyager exhibit to provide an enrichment for their sea turtle.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Seal the Deal
programme.desc: Two African penguins, Freya and Neo, welcome a young chick, but there's cause for concern when health problems arise. Staff work to train a trio of harbor seals to ride the elevator, with the only hiccup being a nervous seal named Floyd.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Otter Tale
programme.desc: Beloved Asian small-clawed otter Pinkie has a recurring bloody nose, and the team goes to great lengths to find out what could be causing it. Feisty baby American alligators arrive at the aquarium and must learn to eat in an orderly way.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Toddler Sea Lion Scarlett
programme.desc: A southern sea otter is rushed to the health center. The team travels to Key Largo to help coral restoration efforts. Young African penguins prepare for an upcoming event. Love is in the air for a trainer and his favorite sea lion pup, Scarlett.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Ophelia the Octopus
programme.desc: Two rescued sea lions arrive at the aquarium, and trainers help prepare them for an upcoming eye surgery. The team travels to the Bahamas to research the effects of plastics in the ocean on sharks. The aquarium conducts a study to help wild beluga whales.

programme.title: The Zoo: Baby Bunnies, Big World
programme.desc: Crate training Nikita the Amur tiger in preparation for her move to Washington, DC proves challenging. An endangered Chinese alligator shows signs of being pregnant. Plus, staff prepare to release rare New England cottontail rabbits into the wild.

programme.title: The Zoo: Giraffe in the City
programme.desc: A sweet giraffe named Mashengo journeys from the Indiana Zoo to his new home in the Bronx. Keepers hand-raise endangered ducklings and release them onto the duck pond at the Central Park Children's Zoo. Plus, love is in the air for a pair of cloud rats.

programme.title: The Zoo: Taming of the Shrew
programme.desc: Cardiologists try to determine why the geladas are experiencing a life-threatening heart condition. Keepers shift the Nile crocodiles off exhibit for a maintenance project. Later, after a shaky start, the elephant shrews are breeding.

programme.title: The Zoo: Mending Willow
programme.desc: One team tests the problem solving skills of lions against those of snow leopards. Willow, a young red panda, is having mysterious foot problems. Also, the bird department anxiously awaits the gender reveal of two new adjutant stork chicks.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Love at First Sight
programme.desc: Tia's son Kanani, and his fiancée M2, prepare for their wedding. Parolee Jammall finds an abandoned dog and asks Mariah for help rescuing it. Plus, a mother and son visit Villalobos hoping to find a new friend for their family dog.

programme.desc: Forced to reckon with their friction, Francesca finally comes to a decision regarding Elizabeth’s future on deck. Meanwhile, Rachel’s feelings toward the interior take a toll on the crew.

programme.title: Below Deck: Sailing Yacht: Never Before Scene: Running on Fumes
programme.desc: Catch a special episode of Below Deck Sailing Yacht featuring bonus footage, extended scenes and never-before-seen content.

programme.title: Below Deck: Sailing Yacht: Nookie Mistake
programme.desc: Deckhand Jean-Luc tries to rebound after losing two guests, but his inability to sleep in his undersized bunk interferes with his work and his attitude. When the dust settles, the crew pulls together a 80s rock party.

programme.title: Movie: The Shawshank Redemption
programme.desc: A banker is wrongly convicted of a double murder and is sent to prison for life.

programme.title: Movie: The Shawshank Redemption
programme.desc: A banker is wrongly convicted of a double murder and is sent to prison for life.

programme.title: Dannemora Prison Break
programme.desc: In 2015 two murderers charmed a prison seamstress and broke out of a fortress thought to be impenetrable. Explore the woman at the center of the story and if she was a willing accomplice or an easy mark.

programme.title: Top Chef: Holy Macau!
programme.desc: The final five chefs travel to the Chinese territory of Macau for the remaining battles. Graham Elliot introduces the chefs to the local market. Then, the chefs throw a party celebrating Chinese New Year, with pork products for the Year of the Pig.

programme.title: Top Chef: The Tao of Macau
programme.desc: The day has come when the final four chefs must cook with the world's smelliest fruit durian.

programme.title: Top Chef: Finale
programme.desc: It's the final showdown and the top three chefs must create the best four course meal of their lives. Tom reveals in a twisted turn of events only two chefs will get the chance to serve their full menu. Only one chef will be named top chef.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: I Like Big Boats and I Cannot Lie
programme.desc: Captain Sandy Yawn is at the helm of the mega-yacht Wellington, cruising one of the most desired yachting locations in the Mediterranean: Mallorca, Spain. Malia returns as Captain Sandy's first female Bosun, a role she hopes to grow into.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Can't Touch This!
programme.desc: Hannah struggles to get her Second Stew in line, and tensions reach a boiling point when Lara refuses to take direction from Hannah. In the galley, Kiko finds himself up against guest that are less than satisfied. Malia deals with a green deck crew.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: The Italian's Job
programme.desc: Romance is in bloom on the crew's first night out of the season as Pete makes his move while Rob and Jess find themselves connecting on a deeper level. The second charter kicks off when guest with ties to the music industry arrive.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Ace of Stew Face
programme.desc: With bad weather rolling in and down her second stew, Hannah scrambles to manage the interior with only Jess to rely on. Captain Sandy and Malia draw a hard line with the deck team when they call the guys out for their questionable behaviour.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Bringing the Thunder
programme.desc: A blast from the past returns amidst a massive thunderstorm that threatens to keep the Wellington docked for their next charter. Rob and Jessica deepen their connection, while Pete's attitude continues to frustrate Malia.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Oh Snap!
programme.desc: Kiko faces his biggest challenge yet when demanding charter guests invite friends to join a six-course dinner. Hannah confronts Bugsy about their past, while Rob and Jess find their budding relationship threatened by a new revelation.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: No Mushroom for Error
programme.desc: An injured Jess fights to maintain her spot on the boat, while another crew member’s inappropriate behavior finally catches up to him. Meanwhile, high-maintenance charter guests challenge the interior and expose cracks in Hannah and Bugsy’s relationship.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Rise and Don't Shine
programme.desc: After struggling through the first day of charter, Kilo fights to regain his footing with a demanding set of charter guests. While Hannah leans on an overworked Bugsy to carry an injured Jess, Captain Sandy becomes concerned about interior's performance.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Viva, Loss Vegas
programme.desc: On a crew night out, Alex reveals his feelings to Bugsy while Hannah struggles to connect with the group. Meanwhile, Captain Sandy comes down on Jess for her performance in the laundry room, and Malia has an incident with the water toys.

programme.title: Movie: Neighbors
programme.desc: A couple's hopes for raising their new baby in a quiet neighbourhood are shattered when a fraternity moves into the house next door. An all-out war is waged when the family finally calls in a noise complaint on the frat boys, who are quick to retaliate.

programme.title: Secrets of Sulphur Springs: Time Warped

programme.title: Snapped: Valerie Pape
programme.desc: An Arizona socialite makes a gruesome discovery which leads local law enforcement to ask questions about her troubled marriage. She claims she found a man dead, but police have reason to believe otherwise.

programme.title: Snapped: Crystal Weimer
programme.desc: A young man is brutally murdered and a woman is found covered in blood just hours later. She is adamant that she is innocent, and later a twist in the case shocks everyone involved.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer: Deadly Disrespect
programme.desc: After a 35-year-old analyst for the NSA is fatally stabbed, police look at a number of suspects. As detectives close in on the killer, the investigation takes a shocking turn.

programme.title: Mysteries & Scandals: Serial Killers of the ‘80s
programme.desc: Richard Ramirez was a satanic killer terrorizing an entire state who sexually assaulted his victims. Aileen Wuornos, a highway hooker with a gun. Doug Clark and Carol Bundy prowled the Sunset Strip for sex and victims.

programme.title: Snapped: Notorious: The BTK Serial Killer
programme.desc: Self-named killer B.T.K., murdered 10 people over 17 years all while taunting Wichita police and media before being exposed as family man and churchgoer, Dennis Rader. In an exclusively acquired interview, he reveals what drove him to do it.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Mystery in Payson Canyon
programme.desc: Kay Mortensen took pride in preparing for every possible threat, so when he was found dead at home, those who knew him were stunned. The brutal killing put two of Kay's loved ones behind bars and in danger.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood: Widowed Witness
programme.desc: A brutal attack leaves a witness to murder. But when the police find the killer, turns out the intended victim, and the motive, were not what anyone imagined.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood: Guilty as Charged
programme.desc: When a prominent attorney is found savagely stabbed to death in her office, investigators find themselves with a myriad of suspects - from violent felons to lesbian love triangles. In the end, they discover a killer as cold as they come.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood: Family Ties
programme.desc: What originally looked like a heart attack turns out to be a calculated execution. Soon, detectives unravel a murder plot that hits a little too close to home.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood: Baby Mama Drama
programme.desc: When a mother is found shot dead, with her 9-month-old daughter in the next room, detectives uncover a path of late-night encounters, secret lovers, and seething jealousy.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood: Two Prints
programme.desc: A loving woman is found stabbed to death in her apartment. With a long list of admirers, investigators uncover secret obsessions that lead to a sadistic killer nobody suspected.

programme.title: Dateline: The Disappearance of Sandi Johnson
programme.desc: Sandi Johnson vanished without a word, leaving family frantic as she always put her kids first. Police quickly uncover dark secrets in her marriage and several men in her life.

programme.title: Dateline: 12 Minutes on Elm Street
programme.desc: Cousins Nick Brady and Haile Kifer were best friends. To their family, they seemed like typical teenagers. Turns out, the cousins had a secret that lead to tragedy. The story divided a small town and sparked a national debate.

programme.title: Dateline: Unforgettable: Secret Lives
programme.desc: This story was one of Andrea Canning's first assignments for 'Dateline,' and one she still can’t forget. When Jen Ramsaran disappeared, police searched online for clues and wondered if she escaped the real world for a fantasy world.

programme.title: Dateline: Unforgettable: Mystery in Orange County
programme.desc: This was a case that stayed with Josh Mankiewicz for years. After a young Army veteran disappeared, detectives uncovered a cryptic 911 call placed 11 days before she went missing, which exposed a twisted story and the truth.

programme.title: Dateline: Unforgettable: The Client
programme.desc: Andrea Canning will never forget this story because of the number of twists and turns. Beverly Carter was a top-selling realtor who went missing after showing a house. When her friends received mysterious text messages, they knew something was wrong.

programme.title: Killer Motive: Domestic Terror
programme.desc: A Naval officer who rose through the ranks and once questioned terrorists at Guantanamo Bay is found by his wife, dead inside a Florida hotel room. Is the brutal crime connected to his wartime service, or are secrets closer to home to blame?

programme.title: Killer Motive: Waking Nightmare
programme.desc: When a wife claims she woke up to discover her husband had been shot to death as she slept next to him – and she didn't see or hear a thing – police are dubious. Is she a shocked and grieving widow, or a cunning killer with a twisted master plan?

programme.title: Snapped: Barbara Garcia
programme.desc: Trick-or-treaters in a small Indiana town have no idea that the sweet grandmother passing out candy is also hiding a deadly secret in her garage.

programme.title: Snapped: Daniel Clay
programme.desc: After a massive Halloween bash ends with a young woman’s mysterious disappearance, a tiny farming town fears that evil stalks its fields.

programme.title: Snapped: Helen Moore
programme.desc: Helen's boyfriend goes missing just as authorities find a dismembered torso, but is it case closed or 20 years later, is Helen's new story a game changer.

programme.title: Movie: Something Borrowed
programme.desc: After a night of drinking, a woman sleeps with her best friend's fiancé and falls in love with him.

programme.title: The Simpsons: 'Tis the 30th Season
programme.desc: After failed Black Friday shopping, Marge is determined to fix Christmas but Homer and the kids decide to surprise her by going on vacation to a Floridian resort that turns out to be a knock-off Disney World.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Mad About the Toy
programme.desc: When Marge and Homer leave Grampa to babysit the kids, some little green army men trigger a PTSD episode, sending the family on a journey to Grampa’s past to when he was a post-war toy model.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Girl on the Bus
programme.desc: When Lisa spots a new best friend from the window of the bus, she gets a taste of what life could be like with a different, more cultured family, and proceeds to try and live a double life.

programme.title: The Simpsons: I'm Dancing as Fat as I Can
programme.desc: Homer angers Marge by binging their favourite show without her, and has to pick up a new skill in order to make amends. Meanwhile, Bart prepares to compete in 'Krusty's Holiday Trample.'

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Clown Stays in the Picture
programme.desc: Krusty reveals the untold story of his past in his movie 'The Sands of Space.' While working as personal assistants on the movie, Bart and Lisa learn about the early years of their parents' relationship.

programme.title: The Simpsons: 101 Mitigations
programme.desc: After Homer steals Comic Book Guy's car, he must either prove his innocence in court or reconcile with the jilted nerd.

programme.title: The Simpsons: I Want You (She's So Heavy)
programme.desc: When a romantic night ends in injury, Marge recovers by taking up kite boarding while Homer bonds with his hallucinated hernia. Lisa attempts to fix her parents' strained relationship by seeking advice from an unlikely source.

programme.title: The Simpsons: E My Sports
programme.desc: As Bart begins to excel in video game competitions, Homer discovers a passion for coaching him. Lisa attempts to bring Homer back to reality, but the plan causes chaos.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Girl's in the Band
programme.desc: Lisa is scouted by the director of the Capitol City Philharmonic, to her band teacher's dismay. Homer works extra shifts at the plant so Lisa can play, putting strain on the family.

programme.title: The Simpsons: D'oh Canada
programme.desc: On a family vacation to Niagara Falls, Lisa is mistakenly granted political asylum in Canada. When Marge goes to rescue Lisa, they are forced to re-evaluate their love for America as they navigate the polite Canadian landscape.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Woo-Hoo Dunnit
programme.desc: When the secret stack of cash aka Lisa's college fund Marge keeps under the sink goes missing, the documentary crime series 'Deadline Springfield' goes in-depth to solve the case, leaving no stone unturned.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Crystal Blue-Haired Persuasion
programme.desc: After Homer's work cuts children's healthcare benefits, Marge turns to buying healing crystals as a cheaper solution for Bart's ADD. Bart begins to succeed in school, prompting Marge to open her very own crystals empire.

programme.title: Family Guy: Island Adventure
programme.desc: In search of Stewie's cherished big wheel tricycle, that Peter threw out, Stewie and Brian embark on an adventure to 'Garbage Island,' a giant floating mass of trash out in the sea. Meanwhile, Lois tries to help Quagmire elevate his dating game.

programme.title: Family Guy: Rich Old Stewie
programme.desc: Stewie's future life could not be going any better, living as a wealthy, old Mr. Burns-type man, until his retirement is interrupted by Brian, who brings news that Peter is dying.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Treasure of Solomon
programme.desc: The High Priests of the Temple in Jerusalem could have hidden their most sacred items before the city was sacked by the Romans and the Dead Sea Scrolls could actually be a treasure map to these hidden wonders. See what else lies under this ancient city.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Mysteries of the Bermuda Triangle
programme.desc: Cutting-edge investigations at the Bermuda Triangle might confirm the newest theories of what really goes on in this deadly stretch of water. What experts find points to something stranger than fiction.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Hitler's Executioner
programme.desc: We reveal the remarkable story of Johann Reichhart, the man who went from German state executioner before WW2 to head up a merciless Nazi killing machine which murdered thousands. In a bizarre twist of fate, Reichhart ended up working for the Allies.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Secret History of James Bond
programme.desc: James Bond is one of the famous characters in history, and new discoveries reveal there might be a secret truth behind this world-famous figure. Experts team up with a former spy to separate fact from fiction and reveal the secrets of modern espionage.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Lost Treasures of Petra
programme.desc: It is one of the great wonders of the ancient world, but there is little information on who built the magnificent city of Petra in Jordan and why. See what treasure remains buried there and the dark secrets that remain in this mysterious place.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Real Holy Grail
programme.desc: Find out what The Holy Grail could have been, whether it was a cup from the Last Supper or used to cleanse Jesus’ body after the Crucifixion, and see where it could be today.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Real Ark of the Convenant
programme.desc: The Biblical mystery of the whereabouts of the Ark of the Covenant is unravelled on a quest across continents. Believed to be the throne of God himself, the search for the Ark leads us to where many are convinced is its current resting place, Ethiopia.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Secrets of the Illuminati
programme.desc: Discover the secrets of the mysterious group known as 'The Illuminati,' and where they operate from. Find out if they are really some secret world government operating in the shadows, or if they're just one huge conspiracy.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Mystery of the Giants
programme.desc: Discover why so many of our cultures refer to giants and if they were myths or could have actually walked the earth. See the tombs and skeletons discovered in Sardinia, where evidence of giants may have been found.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Lost Treasure of the Templars
programme.desc: The Knights Templar may have discovered a great treasure in Jerusalem and brought it back to Europe to become more powerful than the Pope itself. We try to solve the mystery of why this treasure disappeared.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Oracles of the Dead
programme.desc: The Oracles were thought to be young women of the underworld who were consulted by ancient Greek society, and their visions helped shape the course of history. Find the truth behind their extraordinary trances and apparent psychic powers.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Nazi Quest for Holy Relics
programme.desc: As the Nazi war machine tore through Europe, they plundered museums in search of holy relics that would grant them untold power and prestige. experts investigate how close Hitler was to discovering the Holy Grail and its promise of eternal life.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: Hold the Line
programme.desc: In August 1992, millionaire Tennessee landowner Allen Roberts arrives home to discover his wife is missing. He tells police he received a ransom call for Doe's safe return. Slowly, the town turns on Allen: until police take note of one odd neighbor.

programme.title: Man With a Van: Road Rage
programme.desc: When Ray and Marie Thornton head out for a drive in the country on Easter Sunday, they are nearly chased off the road by a tailgating van. When the Thornton's spot the van's driver changing license plates and dumping a bloody sheet, they call police.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: My Worst Fear
programme.desc: Police are shocked to find a 13-year-old boy killed in an explosion, but their grief turns to alarm when they discover a second, unexploded bomb. To catch the killer, Det. Joe Kenda must first figure out whom the bomb was meant for.

programme.title: Dark Waters: Murder in the Deep: Hijacked
programme.desc: Kelley Branam's husband Jake is a Miami charter boat captain with high aspirations. Jake works long hours to support his new family but Kelley's suspicions run deep. Out of the blue, she decides to join Jake on a charter and is never heard from again.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Betting on Murder
programme.desc: Gail and Stephen Dews have it all: a happy marriage, a beautiful house and healthy children. But a family tragedy and a gambling addiction rips their lives to shreds, proving that nothing is what it seems.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: She Loves Me Not
programme.desc: When Special Forces Major David Shannon is fatally shot in his family home, investigators wonder if his job made him a target. But a deeper inspection of his personal life reveals sordid secrets... possibly leading to his murder.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Disappearance of Kelly Dwyer
programme.desc: A young woman vanished after a night out in Milwaukee in October 2013. Did a meeting set up on a dating app lead to the disappearance or was it someone she knew?

programme.title: Deadly Women: Love Turns to Hate
programme.desc: Love is a powerful emotion but so is hate.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: Gambling With Death
programme.desc: Ernest and Charlene Scherer are found beaten and stabbed to death in their exclusive Northern California community. It appears to be a robbery gone wrong, until investigators hone in on the motive.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Hollywood Horror Story
programme.desc: A mother’s intuition that something is wrong with her daughter leads Los Angeles police to a house of horrors. Inside, they found Iana Kasian, 30, brutally murdered. Where the trail of blood led them could be the subject of a movie script or horror novel.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Innocent blood spills when these deadly women reach their tipping point.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: The Ties That Bind
programme.desc: A teenage romance gets caught in family ties.

programme.title: Who the (Bleep) Did I Marry?: The Sympathy Card
programme.desc: For Tabitha Howe, romance was the last thing on her mind when she fell for Scott Wellington. But behind his kind-hearted façade was a monster. And Tabitha would soon question everything she knew about her first true love.

programme.title: Who the (Bleep) Did I Marry?: Poison Love
programme.desc: When 28-year-old army vet Nathan Richardson settles into civilian life, he falls for actress Shannon Rogers. Not long after they took their vows, Nathan discovered the devil behind Shannon's smile and would soon find himself a matter of national security.

programme.title: Wives With Knives: Shear Rage
programme.desc: Stories of women who stab their significant others.

programme.title: Deadline: Crime With Tamron Hall: Home Alone
programme.desc: Twelve-year-old Garrett Phillips is attacked while home alone; his killer jumps unseen from a window and investigators are left with a vexing mystery that rattles the village of Potsdam, New York.

programme.title: Deadline: Crime With Tamron Hall: Gulf Coast Vanishings
programme.desc: In Southwest Florida, Terrance Williams, a young father, disappears. As his mother retraces his steps she uncovers something ominous: the last known person to see Terrance alive has a strange and disturbing connection to another missing man.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: What Happened to Baby Lisa?
programme.desc: In 2011, a 10-month-old baby girl goes missing from her home in Kansas City. The family fears she's been kidnapped by a drifter, only to be accused by the police of being responsible for her disappearance.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Death Before Dawn
programme.desc: In Orange County, California, screams of terror ring out from the home of multimillionaires. A series of clues lead the police on a hunt to find a wealthy couple's killer and bring justice to their five now orphaned children.

programme.title: Deadly Women: DIY Burial
programme.desc: Dig into the world of these Deadly Women... and in their 'DIY Burial,' you will find blood and bone.

programme.title: Betrayed: Death by Design
programme.desc: 27-year-old single mom Laura Ackerson is looking to make a fresh start in Raleigh, North Carolina. She starts a new company and new relationships while battling for custody of her two young children. She also meets her untimely demise.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Nightmare Next Door
programme.desc: Two neighbors in New Brighton, Minnesota get along great until one of them catches Lyme Disease from the deer the other feeds on his property. The ensuing blame game, hostility and rising conflict ends in gunfire, death, injury and ruin.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: Mother and Child
programme.desc: An unbelievable tragedy ripples through a small community and sends John in pursuit of outlaw Jory Worthen. Callahan takes on the case of fugitive Derrell Demon Brown, an offender with a dark past who committed a violent, personal crime.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: The Kind Sister
programme.desc: Elizabeth Baune was a pillar of her community until she was stabbed to death in her own home. The rural town of Payette, Idaho is horrified by the tragic death of a teacher, especially since Elizabeth's own good nature may have been behind her death.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Coal Miner's Slaughter
programme.desc: A respected businesswoman in the placid town of Madisonville, KY is found bludgeoned and stabbed to death in her home.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Hollywood Syndicate
programme.desc: Examine some of the common conspiracy theories surrounding Hollywood. Suspicions about the activities of the Church of Scientology and the hacking of Sony Pictures are amongst the topics discussed.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Kennedy Killings
programme.desc: Conspiracy theories surrounding the assassination of Robert Kennedy, the murder of TV presenter Jill Dando and the death of government weapons inspector Dr. David Kelly are examined.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Vanished
programme.desc: Examine some of the most famous cases of disappearances that have gone on to spawn conspiracy theories to explain them. John Bingham, 7th Earl of Lucan, union leader Jimmy Hoffa and Robert Maxwell come under discussion.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got Caught by a Cougar
programme.desc: Robert Spencer has just shot his girlfriend. He is a thug and drug dealer, who in a blind panic gets high and goes on the run, living every day as a party. He finds the affection of a friend's mother, which ultimately leads to his arrest.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Rob Banks
programme.desc: Joe Loya is a professional bank robber, addicted to the adrenaline of power. After 13 months of successful robberies, Loya's luck runs out when one robbery goes wrong. It's the latest in bank technology that leads investigators to Loya and ends his spree.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Ride the Rails
programme.desc: A neighbour calls 911 when she smells smoke coming from an apartment shared by Ricky Sleight and William Baldi. The police find Baldi's dead body, but Sleight escapes by riding freight trains across the country. The FBI turns to the media for help.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Burn a Truck
programme.desc: Jermaine LeBron and his friends murdered a man in Florida and stole his expensive truck.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Steal a Rich Woman's Jewelry
programme.desc: An elderly woman puts up a fight when an ex-employee tries to steal her rings, and is murdered.

programme.title: Against the Odds: A Chance in Hell: The Battle of Ramadi
programme.desc: When Colonel McFarland arrived in Iraq, Al-Qaeda had already declared Ramadi the capital of a new caliphate. The soldiers of McFarland's Ready First Combat Team fight to give American a victory.

programme.desc: The paratroopers of Fighting Fox Company, 2nd Battalion, 506th Parachute Infantry Regiment fought and died from Normandy to Hitler's Eagle's Nest. Their sheer determination against the enemy was matched only by their devotion to one another.

programme.desc: American military involvement in Vietnam lasted 12 years and cost the lives of almost 60,000 soldiers. We highlight the decisive moments, from the first shot, to the withdrawal of the last Marine - breaking down the key battles and turning points.

programme.title: Bullet Points: Battle for the Pacific
programme.desc: See how America recovered from Pearl Harbor and, in one year, achieved supremacy in the Pacific over the Japanese empire. Featuring highlights of the defining battles that turned the tide in the Pacific theater and led to victory.

programme.desc: Devastation touches the civilians of Germany. With the U.S. as a newly engaged Ally, western forces bring the war to the Axis front, but at extreme costs.

programme.title: Hitler's Death Ray
